It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }} A {{ill|Mune-fuda|ja|棟札}} dated {{ill|August 14|ja|8月14日}}, 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.額田町史、pp.188-189 This plaque predates others such as the one from {{ill|1122|ja|1122年}} ({{ill|Hōan|ja|保安}} 3) at {{ill|Chūson-ji|ja|中尊寺}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}} However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity. The plaque was exhibited at the {{ill|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|ja|名古屋汎太平洋平和博覧会}} in {{ill|1937|ja|1937年}} ({{ill|Shōwa|ja|昭和}} 12). In {{ill|1894|ja|1894年}} (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in {{ill|1935|ja|1935年}} (Shōwa 10). A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}}, {{ill|2012|ja|2012年}} (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == {{main|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival}} == References == {{reflist}} {{脚注ヘルプ}} == Bibliography == * 『額田町史』額田町史編集委員会、{{ill|1986|ja|1986年}}11月1日 * 『愛知縣額田郡誌（復刻版）』千秋社、{{ill|2003|ja|2003年}} * {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |名称 = 夏山八幡宮 |image = [[File:Natsuyama-Hachiman-gû Shintô Shrine - Shaden.jpg|270px]]
社殿 |location = {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}{{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}{{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}}字宮本 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|56|30.1|N|137|18|40.3|E|region:JP-23_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=夏山八幡宮}} |deity = {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命}}, {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神}}, {{ill|Tagiri-hime|ja|多紀理姫命}}, {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸嶋姫命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多紀津姫命}}, {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = {{ill|Okazaki City Hall|ja|岡崎市役所}} |page = 40 }} |type = 郷社 |創建 = {{ill|531|ja|531年}}（{{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}25年） |本殿 = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|一間社流造}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = 岡崎市役所 |page = 206 }} |別名 = |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}} }} [[File:Natsuyama-Hachimangu-5.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}]] '''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}}, {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}, held in {{ill|October|ja|10月}}. == Overview == The shrine was established in {{ill|531|ja|531年}} (25th year of {{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命}}.愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353 In {{ill|880|ja|880年}} ({{ill|Gangyō|ja|元慶}} 4), {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸島比賣命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }} On {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} of {{ill|1872|ja|1872年}} ({{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社}} under the {{ill|Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|ja|近代type制度}}. It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }} A {{ill|Mune-fuda|ja|棟札}} dated {{ill|August 14|ja|8月14日}}, 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.額田町史、pp.188-189 This plaque predates others such as the one from {{ill|1122|ja|1122年}} ({{ill|Hōan|ja|保安}} 3) at {{ill|Chūson-ji|ja|中尊寺}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}} However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity. The plaque was exhibited at the {{ill|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|ja|名古屋汎太平洋平和博覧会}} in {{ill|1937|ja|1937年}} ({{ill|Shōwa|ja|昭和}} 12). In {{ill|1894|ja|1894年}} (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in {{ill|1935|ja|1935年}} (Shōwa 10). A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}}, {{ill|2012|ja|2012年}} (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == {{main|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival}} == References == {{reflist}} {{脚注ヘルプ}} == Bibliography == * 『額田町史』額田町史編集委員会、{{ill|1986|ja|1986年}}11月1日 * 『愛知縣額田郡誌（復刻版）』千秋社、{{ill|2003|ja|2003年}} * 『三河國額田郡誌（完）』愛知県額田郡役所、{{ill|1924|ja|1924年}}（原本） == See also == {{Commonscat|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} * {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}} * {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}} * {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡}} * {{ill|Toyotomi {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |名称 = 夏山八幡宮 |image = [[File:Natsuyama-Hachiman-gû Shintô Shrine - Shaden.jpg|270px]]
社殿 |location = {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}{{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}{{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}}字宮本 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|56|30.1|N|137|18|40.3|E|region:JP-23_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=夏山八幡宮}} |deity = {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命}}, {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神}}, {{ill|Tagiri-hime|ja|多紀理姫命}}, {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸嶋姫命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多紀津姫命}}, {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = {{ill|Okazaki City Hall|ja|岡崎市役所}} |page = 40 }} |type = 郷社 |創建 = {{ill|531|ja|531年}}（{{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}25年） |本殿 = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|一間社流造}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = 岡崎市役所 |page = 206 }} |別名 = |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}} }} [[File:Natsuyama-Hachimangu-5.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}]] '''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}}, {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}, held in {{ill|October|ja|10月}}. == Overview == The shrine was established in {{ill|531|ja|531年}} (25th year of {{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命}}.愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353 In {{ill|880|ja|880年}} ({{ill|Gangyō|ja|元慶}} 4), {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸島比賣命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }} On {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} of {{ill|1872|ja|1872年}} ({{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社}} under the {{ill|Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|ja|近代type制度}}. It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }} A {{ill|Mune-fuda|ja|棟札}} dated {{ill|August 14|ja|8月14日}}, 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.額田町史、pp.188-189 This plaque predates others such as the one from {{ill|1122|ja|1122年}} ({{ill|Hōan|ja|保安}} 3) at {{ill|Chūson-ji|ja|中尊寺}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}} However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity. The plaque was exhibited at the {{ill|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|ja|名古屋汎太平洋平和博覧会}} in {{ill|1937|ja|1937年}} ({{ill|Shōwa|ja|昭和}} 12). In {{ill|1894|ja|1894年}} (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in {{ill|1935|ja|1935年}} (Shōwa 10). A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}}, {{ill|2012|ja|2012年}} (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == {{main|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival}} == References == {{reflist}} {{脚注ヘルプ}} == Bibliography == * 『額田町史』額田町史編集委員会、{{ill|1986|ja|1986年}}11月1日 * 『愛知縣額田郡誌（復刻版）』千秋社、{{ill|2003|ja|2003年}} * 『三河國額田郡誌（完）』愛知県額田郡役所、{{ill|1924|ja|1924年}}（原本） == See also == {{Commonscat|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} * {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}} * {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}} * {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡}} * {{ill|Toyotomi Village|ja|豊富村 (愛知県額田郡)}} * {{ill|Sakaeji Village|ja|栄枝村}} {{神道 横}} [[Category:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine-qq]] [[Category:Hachiman shrines]] [[Category:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine-qq]] 社殿 |location = {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}{{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}{{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}}字宮本 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|56|30.1|N|137|18|40.3|E|region:JP-23_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=夏山八幡宮}} |deity = {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone}}, {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神}}, {{ill|Tagiri-hime|ja|多紀理姫命}}, {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸嶋姫命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多紀津姫命}}, {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = {{ill|Okazaki City Hall|ja|岡崎市役所}} |page = 40 }} |type = 郷社 |創建 = {{ill|531|ja|531年}}（{{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}25年） |本殿 = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|一間社流造}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = 岡崎市役所 |page = 206 }} |別名 = |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}} }} [[File:Natsuyama-Hachimangu-5.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}]] '''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}}, {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}, held in {{ill|October|ja|10月}}. == Overview == The shrine was established in {{ill|531|ja|531年}} (25th year of {{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone}}.愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353 In {{ill|880|ja|880年}} ({{ill|Gangyō|ja|元慶}} 4), {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸島比賣命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }} On {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} of {{ill|1872|ja|1872年}} ({{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社}} under the {{ill|Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|ja|近代社格制度|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}. It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }} A {{ill|Mune-fuda|ja|棟札}} dated {{ill|August 14|ja|8月14日}}, 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.額田町史、pp.188-189 This plaque predates others such as the one from {{ill|1122|ja|1122年}} ({{ill|Hōan|ja|保安}} 3) at {{ill|Chūson-ji|ja|中尊寺}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}} However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity. The plaque was exhibited at the {{ill|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|ja|名古屋汎太平洋平和博覧会}} in {{ill|1937|ja|1937年}} ({{ill|Shōwa|ja|昭和}} 12). In {{ill|1894|ja|1894年}} (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in {{ill|1935|ja|1935年}} (Shōwa 10). A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}}, {{ill|2012|ja|2012年}} (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == {{main|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival}} == References == {{reflist}} {{脚注ヘルプ}} == Bibliography == * 『額田町史』額田町史編集委員会、{{ill|1986|ja|1986年}}11月1日 * 『愛知縣額田郡誌（復刻版）』千秋社、{{ill|2003|ja|2003年}} * {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |名称 = 夏山八幡宮 |image = [[File:Natsuyama-Hachiman-gû Shintô Shrine - Shaden.jpg|270px]]
社殿 |location = {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}{{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}{{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}}字宮本 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|56|30.1|N|137|18|40.3|E|region:JP-23_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=夏山八幡宮}} |deity = {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone}}, {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神}}, {{ill|Tagiri-hime|ja|多紀理姫命}}, {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸嶋姫命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多紀津姫命}}, {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = {{ill|Okazaki City Hall|ja|岡崎市役所}} |page = 40 }} |type = 郷社 |創建 = {{ill|531|ja|531年}}（{{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}25年） |本殿 = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|一間社流造}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = 岡崎市役所 |page = 206 }} |別名 = |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}} }} [[File:Natsuyama-Hachimangu-5.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}]] '''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}}, {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}, held in {{ill|October|ja|10月}}. == Overview == The shrine was established in {{ill|531|ja|531年}} (25th year of {{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone}}.愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353 In {{ill|880|ja|880年}} ({{ill|Gangyō|ja|元慶}} 4), {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸島比賣命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }} On {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} of {{ill|1872|ja|1872年}} ({{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社}} under the {{ill|Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|ja|近代社格制度|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}. It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }} A {{ill|Mune-fuda|ja|棟札}} dated {{ill|August 14|ja|8月14日}}, 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.額田町史、pp.188-189 This plaque predates others such as the one from {{ill|1122|ja|1122年}} ({{ill|Hōan|ja|保安}} 3) at {{ill|Chūson-ji|ja|中尊寺}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}} However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity. The plaque was exhibited at the {{ill|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|ja|名古屋汎太平洋平和博覧会}} in {{ill|1937|ja|1937年}} ({{ill|Shōwa|ja|昭和}} 12). In {{ill|1894|ja|1894年}} (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in {{ill|1935|ja|1935年}} (Shōwa 10). A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}}, {{ill|2012|ja|2012年}} (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == {{main|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival}} == References == {{reflist}} {{脚注ヘルプ}} == Bibliography == * 『額田町史』額田町史編集委員会、{{ill|1986|ja|1986年}}11月1日 * 『愛知縣額田郡誌（復刻版）』千秋社、{{ill|2003|ja|2003年}} * 『三河國額田郡誌（完）』愛知県額田郡役所、{{ill|1924|ja|1924年}}（原本） == See also == {{Commonscat|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} * {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}} * {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}} * {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡}} * {{ill|Toyotomi Village|ja|豊富村 (愛知県額田郡)}} * {{ill|Sakaeji Village|ja|栄枝村}} {{神道 横}} [[Category:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq deprecated start]][[Category:qq It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}, held in {{ill|October|ja|10月}}. == Overview == The shrine was established in {{ill|531|ja|531年}} (25th year of {{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone}}.愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353 In {{ill|880|ja|880年}} ({{ill|Gangyō|ja|元慶}} 4), {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸島比賣命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }} On {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} of {{ill|1872|ja|1872年}} ({{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社}} under the {{ill|Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|ja|近代社格制度|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}. It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }} A {{ill|Mune-fuda|ja|棟札}} dated {{ill|August 14|ja|8月14日}}, 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.額田町史、pp.188-189 This plaque predates others such as the one from {{ill|1122|ja|1122年}} ({{ill|Hōan|ja|保安}} 3) at {{ill|Chūson-ji|ja|中尊寺}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}} However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity. The plaque was exhibited at the {{ill|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|ja|名古屋汎太平洋平和博覧会}} in {{ill|1937|ja|1937年}} ({{ill|Shōwa|ja|昭和}} 12). In {{ill|1894|ja|1894年}} (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in {{ill|1935|ja|1935年}} (Shōwa 10). A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}}, {{ill|2012|ja|2012年}} (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == {{main|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival}} == References == {{reflist}} {{脚注ヘルプ}} == Bibliography == * 『額田町史』額田町史編集委員会、{{ill|1986|ja|1986年}}11月1日 * 『愛知縣額田郡誌（復刻版）』千秋社、{{ill|2003|ja|2003年}} * 『三河國額田郡誌（完）』愛知県額田郡役所、{{ill|1924|ja|1924年}}（原本） == See also == {{Commonscat|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} * {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}} * {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}} * {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡}} * {{ill|Toyotomi Village|ja|豊富村 (愛知県額田郡)}} * {{ill|Sakaeji Village|ja|栄枝村}} {{神道 横}} [[Category:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq deprecated start]][[Category:qq {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |名称 = 夏山八幡宮 |image = [[File:Natsuyama-Hachiman-gû Shintô Shrine - Shaden.jpg|270px]]
社殿 |location = {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}{{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}{{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}}字宮本 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|56|30.1|N|137|18|40.3|E|region:JP-23_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=夏山八幡宮}} |deity = {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone}}, {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神}}, {{ill|Tagiri-hime|ja|多紀理姫命}}, {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸嶋姫命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多紀津姫命}}, {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = {{ill|Okazaki City Hall|ja|岡崎市役所}} |page = 40 }} |type = 郷社 |創建 = {{ill|531|ja|531年}}（{{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}25年） |本殿 = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|一間社流造}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = 岡崎市役所 |page = 206 }} |別名 = |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}} }} [[File:Natsuyama-Hachimangu-5.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}]] '''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}}, {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}, held in {{ill|October|ja|10月}}. == Overview == The shrine was established in {{ill|531|ja|531年}} (25th year of {{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone}}.愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353 In {{ill|880|ja|880年}} ({{ill|Gangyō|ja|元慶}} 4), {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸島比賣命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }} On {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} of {{ill|1872|ja|1872年}} ({{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社}} under the {{ill|Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|ja|近代社格制度|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}. It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }} A {{ill|Mune-fuda|ja|棟札}} dated {{ill|August 14|ja|8月14日}}, 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.額田町史、pp.188-189 This plaque predates others such as the one from {{ill|1122|ja|1122年}} ({{ill|Hōan|ja|保安}} 3) at {{ill|Chūson-ji|ja|中尊寺}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}} However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity. The plaque was exhibited at the {{ill|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|ja|名古屋汎太平洋平和博覧会}} in {{ill|1937|ja|1937年}} ({{ill|Shōwa|ja|昭和}} 12). In {{ill|1894|ja|1894年}} (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in {{ill|1935|ja|1935年}} (Shōwa 10). A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}}, {{ill|2012|ja|2012年}} (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == {{main|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival}} == References == {{reflist}} {{脚注ヘルプ}} == Bibliography == * 『額田町史』額田町史編集委員会、{{ill|1986|ja|1986年}}11月1日 * 『愛知縣額田郡誌（復刻版）』千秋社、{{ill|2003|ja|2003年}} * 『三河國額田郡誌（完）』愛知県額田郡役所、{{ill|1924|ja|1924年}}（原本） == See also == {{Commonscat|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} * {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}} * {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}} * {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡}} * {{ill|Toyotomi Village|ja|豊富村 (愛知県額田郡)}} * {{ill|Sakaeji Village|ja|栄枝村}} {{神道 横}} [[Category:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Hachiman shrines]] [[Category:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Former Gōsha shrines]] [[Category:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Shinto Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New pages]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:11]][[sn:atsuyama Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:Removing this excess]]

{{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |名称 = 夏山八幡宮 |image = [[File:Natsuyama-Hachiman-gû Shintô Shrine - Shaden.jpg|270px]]
社殿 |location = {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}{{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}{{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}}字宮本 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|56|30.1|N|137|18|40.3|E|region:JP-23_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=夏山八幡宮}} |deity = {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone}}, {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神}}, {{ill|Tagiri-hime|ja|多紀理姫命}}, {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸嶋姫命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多紀津姫命}}, {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = {{ill|Okazaki City Hall|ja|岡崎市役所}} |page = 40 }} |type = 郷社 |創建 = {{ill|531|ja|531年}}（{{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}25年） |本殿 = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|一間社流造}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = 岡崎市役所 |page = 206 }} |別名 = |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}} }} [[File:Natsuyama-Hachimangu-5.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}]] '''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}}, {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}, held in {{ill|October|ja|10月}}. == Overview == The shrine was established in {{ill|531|ja|531年}} (25th year of {{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone}}.愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353 In {{ill|880|ja|880年}} ({{ill|Gangyō|ja|元慶}} 4), {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸島比賣命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }} On {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} of {{ill|1872|ja|1872年}} ({{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社}} under the {{ill|Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|ja|近代社格制度|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}. It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }} A {{ill|Mune-fuda|ja|棟札}} dated {{ill|August 14|ja|8月14日}}, 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.額田町史、pp.188-189 This plaque predates others such as the one from {{ill|qq22|ja|qq22年}} ({{ill|Hōan|ja|保安}} 3) at {{ill|Chūson-ji|ja|中尊寺}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}} However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity. The plaque was exhibited at the {{ill|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|ja|名古屋汎太平洋平和博覧会}} in {{ill|1937|ja|1937年}} ({{ill|Shōwa|ja|昭和}} 12). In {{ill|1894|ja|1894年}} (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in {{ill|1935|ja|1935年}} (Shōwa 10). A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}}, {{ill|2012|ja|2012年}} (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == {{main|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival}} == References == {{reflist}} {{脚注ヘルプ}} == Bibliography == * 『額田町史』額田町史編集委員会、{{ill|1986|ja|1986年}}qq月1日 * 『愛知縣額田郡誌（復刻版）』千秋社、{{ill|2003|ja|2003年}} * 『三河國額田郡誌（完）』愛知県額田郡役所、{{ill|1924|ja|1924年}}（原本） == See also == {{Commonscat|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} * {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}} * {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}} * {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡}} * {{ill|Toyotomi Village|ja|豊富村 (愛知県額田郡)}} * {{ill|Sakaeji Village|ja|栄枝村}} {{神道 横}} [[Category:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Hachiman shrines]] [[Category:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:qq]] 社殿 |location = {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}{{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}{{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}}字宮本 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|56|30.1|N|137|18|40.3|E|region:JP-23_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=夏山八幡宮}} |deity = {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone}}, {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神}}, {{ill|Tagiri-hime|ja|多紀理姫命}}, {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸嶋姫命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多紀津姫命}}, {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = {{ill|Okazaki City Hall|ja|岡崎市役所}} |page = 40 }} |type = 郷社 |創建 = {{ill|531|ja|531年}}（{{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}25年） |本殿 = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|一間社流造}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = 岡崎市役所 |page = 206 }} |別名 = |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}} }} [[File:Natsuyama-Hachimangu-5.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}]] '''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}}, {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}, held in {{ill|October|ja|10月}}. == Overview == The shrine was established in {{ill|531|ja|531年}} (25th year of {{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone}}.愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353 In {{ill|880|ja|880年}} ({{ill|Gangyō|ja|元慶}} 4), {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸島比賣命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }} On {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} of {{ill|1872|ja|1872年}} ({{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社}} under the {{ill|Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|ja|近代社格制度|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}. It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }} A {{ill|Mune-fuda|ja|棟札}} dated {{ill|August 14|ja|8月14日}}, 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.額田町史、pp.188-189 This plaque predates others such as the one from {{ill|qq22|ja|qq22年}} ({{ill|Hōan|ja|保安}} 3) at {{ill|Chūson-ji|ja|中尊寺}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}} However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity. The plaque was exhibited at the {{ill|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|ja|名古屋汎太平洋平和博覧会}} in {{ill|1937|ja|1937年}} ({{ill|Shōwa|ja|昭和}} 12). In {{ill|1894|ja|1894年}} (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in {{ill|1935|ja|1935年}} (Shōwa 10). A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}}, {{ill|2012|ja|2012年}} (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == {{main|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival}} == References == {{reflist}} {{脚注ヘルプ}} == Bibliography == * 『額田町史』額田町史編集委員会、{{ill|1986|ja|1986年}}qq月1日 * 『愛知縣額田郡誌（復刻版）』千秋社、{{ill|2003|ja|2003年}} * Hachimangu Fire Festival}} == References == {{reflist}} {{脚注ヘルプ}} == Bibliography == * 『額田町史』額田町史編集委員会、{{ill|1986|ja|1986年}}qq月1日 * 『愛知縣額田郡誌（復刻版）』千秋社、{{ill|2003|ja|2003年}} * revision.text:
{{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |名称 = 夏山八幡宮 |image = [[File:Natsuyama-Hachiman-gû Shintô Shrine - Shaden.jpg|270px]]
社殿 |location = {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}{{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}{{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}}字宮本 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|56|30.1|N|137|18|40.3|E|region:JP-23_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=夏山八幡宮}} |deity = {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone}}, {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神}}, {{ill|Tagiri-hime|ja|多紀理姫命}}, {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸嶋姫命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多紀津姫命}}, {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = {{ill|Okazaki City Hall|ja|岡崎市役所}} |page = 40 }} |type = 郷社 |創建 = {{ill|531|ja|531年}}（{{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}25年） |本殿 = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|一間社流造}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = 岡崎市役所 |page = 206 }} |別名 = |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}} }} [[File:Natsuyama-Hachimangu-5.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}]] '''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}}, {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}, held in {{ill|October|ja|10月}}. == Overview == The shrine was established in {{ill|531|ja|531年}} (25th year of {{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone}}.愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353 In {{ill|880|ja|880年}} ({{ill|Gangyō|ja|元慶}} 4), {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸島比賣命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }} On {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} of {{ill|1872|ja|1872年}} ({{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社}} under the {{ill|Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|ja|近代社格制度|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}. It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }} A {{ill|Mune-fuda|ja|棟札}} dated {{ill|August 14|ja|8月14日}}, 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.額田町史、pp.188-189 This plaque predates others such as the one from {{ill|qq22|ja|qq22年}} ({{ill|Hōan|ja|保安}} 3) at {{ill|Chūson-ji|ja|中尊寺}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}} However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity. The plaque was exhibited at the {{ill|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|ja|名古屋汎太平洋平和博覧会}} in {{ill|1937|ja|1937年}} ({{ill|Shōwa|ja|昭和}} 12). In {{ill|1894|ja|1894年}} (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in {{ill|1935|ja|1935年}} (Shōwa 10). A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}}, {{ill|2012|ja|2012年}} (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == {{main|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival}} == References == {{reflist}} {{脚注ヘルプ}} == Bibliography == * 『額田町史』額田町史編集委員会、{{ill|1986|ja|1986年}}qq月1日 * 『愛知縣額田郡誌（復刻版）』千秋社、{{ill|2003|ja|2003年}} * 『三河國額田郡誌（完）』愛知県額田郡役所、{{ill|1924|ja|1924年}}（原本） == See also == {{Commonscat|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} * {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}} * {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}} * {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡}} * {{ill|Toyotomi Village|ja|豊富村 (愛知県額田郡)}} * {{ill|Sakaeji Village|ja|栄枝村}} {{神道 横}} [[Category:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Hachiman shrines]] [[Category:Natsuyama {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |名称 = 夏山八幡宮 |image = [[File:Natsuyama-Hachiman-gû Shintô Shrine - Shaden.jpg|270px]]
社殿 |location = {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}{{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}{{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}}字宮本 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|56|30.1|N|137|18|40.3|E|region:JP-23_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=夏山八幡宮}} |deity = {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone}}, {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神}}, {{ill|Tagiri-hime|ja|多紀理姫命}}, {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸嶋姫命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多紀津姫命}}, {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = {{ill|Okazaki City Hall|ja|岡崎市役所}} |page = 40 }} |type = 郷社 |創建 = {{ill|531|ja|531年}}（{{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}25年） |本殿 = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|一間社流造}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = 岡崎市役所 |page = 206 }} |別名 = |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}} }} [[File:Natsuyama-Hachimangu-5.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}]] '''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}}, {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}, held in {{ill|October|ja|10月}}. == Overview == The shrine was established in {{ill|531|ja|531年}} (25th year of {{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone}}.愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353 In {{ill|880|ja|880年}} ({{ill|Gangyō|ja|元慶}} 4), {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸島比賣命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }} On {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} of {{ill|1872|ja|1872年}} ({{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社}} under the {{ill|Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|ja|近代社格制度|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}. It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }} A {{ill|Mune-fuda|ja|棟札}} dated {{ill|August 14|ja|8月14日}}, 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.額田町史、pp.188-189 This plaque predates others such as the one from {{ill|qq22|ja|qq22年}} ({{ill|Hōan|ja|保安}} 3) at {{ill|Chūson-ji|ja|中尊寺}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}} However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity. The plaque was exhibited at the {{ill|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|ja|名古屋汎太平洋平和博覧会}} in {{ill|1937|ja|1937年}} ({{ill|Shōwa|ja|昭和}} 12). In {{ill|1894|ja|1894年}} (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in {{ill|1935|ja|1935年}} (Shōwa 10). A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}}, {{ill|2012|ja|2012年}} (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == {{main|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival}} == References == {{reflist}} {{脚注ヘルプ}} == Bibliography == * 『額田町史』額田町史編集委員会、{{ill|1986|ja|1986年}}qq月1日 * 『愛知縣額田郡誌（復刻版）』千秋社、{{ill|2003|ja|2003年}} * 『三河國額田郡誌（完）』愛知県額田郡役所、{{ill|1924|ja|1924年}}（原本） == See also == {{Commonscat|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} * {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}} * {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}} * {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡}} * {{ill|Toyotomi Village|ja|豊富村 (愛知県額田郡)}} * {{ill|Sakaeji Village|ja|栄枝村}} {{神道 横}} [[Category:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |名称 = 夏山八幡宮 |image = [[File:Natsuyama-Hachiman-gû Shintô Shrine - Shaden.jpg|270px]]
社殿 |location = {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}{{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}{{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}}字宮本 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|56|30.1|N|137|18|40.3|E|region:JP-23_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=夏山八幡宮}} |deity = {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone}}, {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神}}, {{ill|Tagiri-hime|ja|多紀理姫命}}, {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸嶋姫命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多紀津姫命}}, {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = {{ill|Okazaki City Hall|ja|岡崎市役所}} |page = 40 }} |type = 郷社 |創建 = {{ill|531|ja|531年}}（{{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}25年） |本殿 = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|一間社流造}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = 岡崎市役所 |page = 206 }} |別名 = |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}} }} [[File:Natsuyama-Hachimangu-5.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}]] '''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}}, {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}, held in {{ill|October|ja|10月}}. == Overview == The shrine was established in {{ill|531|ja|531年}} (25th year of {{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone}}.愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353 In {{ill|880|ja|880年}} ({{ill|Gangyō|ja|元慶}} 4), {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸島比賣命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }} On {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} of {{ill|1872|ja|1872年}} ({{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社}} under the {{ill|Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|ja|近代社格制度|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}. It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }} A {{ill|Mune-fuda|ja|棟札}} dated {{ill|August 14|ja|8月14日}}, 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.額田町史、pp.188-189 This plaque predates others such as the one from {{ill|qq22|ja|qq22年}} ({{ill|Hōan|ja|保安}} 3) at {{ill|Chūson-ji|ja|中尊寺}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}} However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity. The plaque was exhibited at the {{ill|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|ja|名古屋汎太平洋平和博覧会}} in {{ill|1937|ja|1937年}} ({{ill|Shōwa|ja|昭和}} 12). In {{ill|1894|ja|1894年}} (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in {{ill|1935|ja|1935年}} (Shōwa 10). A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}}, {{ill|2012|ja|2012年}} (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == {{main|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival}} == References == {{reflist}} {{脚注ヘルプ}} == Bibliography == * 『額田町史』額田町史編集委員会、{{ill|1986|ja|1986年}}qq月1日 * 『愛知縣額田郡誌（復刻版）』千秋社、{{ill|2003|ja|2003年}} * 『三河國額田郡誌（完）』愛知県額田郡役所、{{ill|1924|ja|1924年}}（原本） == See also == {{Commonscat|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} * {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}} * {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}} * {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡}} * {{ill|Toyotomi Village|ja|豊富村 (愛知県額田郡)}} * {{ill|Sakaeji Village|ja|栄枝村}} {{神道 横}} [[Category:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman 社殿 |location = {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}{{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}{{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}}字宮本 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|56|30.1|N|137|18|40.3|E|region:JP-23_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=夏山八幡宮}} |deity = {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone}}, {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神}}, {{ill|Tagiri-hime|ja|多紀理姫命}}, {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸嶋姫命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多紀津姫命}}, {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = {{ill|Okazaki City Hall|ja|岡崎市役所}} |page = 40 }} |type = 郷社 |創建 = {{ill|531|ja|531年}}（{{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}25年） |本殿 = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|一間社流造}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = 岡崎市役所 |page = 206 }} |別名 = |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}} }} [[File:Natsuyama-Hachimangu-5.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}]] '''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}}, {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}, held in {{ill|October|ja|10月}}. == Overview == The shrine was established in {{ill|531|ja|531年}} (25th year of {{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone}}.愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353 In {{ill|880|ja|880年}} ({{ill|Gangyō|ja|元慶}} 4), {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸島比賣命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }} On {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} of {{ill|1872|ja|1872年}} ({{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社}} under the {{ill|Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|ja|近代社格制度|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}. It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }} A {{ill|Mune-fuda|ja|棟札}} dated {{ill|August 14|ja|8月14日}}, 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.額田町史、pp.188-189 This plaque predates others such as the one from {{ill|qq22|ja|qq22年}} ({{ill|Hōan|ja|保安}} 3) at {{ill|Chūson-ji|ja|中尊寺}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}} However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity. The plaque was exhibited at the {{ill|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|ja|名古屋汎太平洋平和博覧会}} in {{ill|1937|ja|1937年}} ({{ill|Shōwa|ja|昭和}} 12). In {{ill|1894|ja|1894年}} (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in {{ill|1935|ja|1935年}} (Shōwa 10). A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}}, {{ill|2012|ja|2012年}} (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == {{main|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival}} == References == {{reflist}} {{脚注ヘルプ}} == Bibliography == * 『額田町史』額田町史編集委員会、{{ill|1986|ja|1986年}}qq月1日 * 『愛知縣額田郡誌（復刻版）』千秋社、{{ill|2003|ja|2003年}} * 社殿 |location = {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}{{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}{{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}}字宮本 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|56|30.1|N|137|18|40.3|E|region:JP-23_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=夏山八幡宮}} |deity = {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone}}, {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神}}, {{ill|Tagiri-hime|ja|多紀理姫命}}, {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸嶋姫命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多紀津姫命}}, {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = {{ill|Okazaki City Hall|ja|岡崎市役所}} |page = 40 }} |type = 郷社 |創建 = {{ill|531|ja|531年}}（{{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}25年） |本殿 = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|一間社流造}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = 岡崎市役所 |page = 206 }} |別名 = |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}} }} [[File:Natsuyama-Hachimangu-5.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}]] '''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}}, {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}, held in {{ill|October|ja|10月}}. == Overview == The shrine was established in {{ill|531|ja|531年}} (25th year of {{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone}}.愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353 In {{ill|880|ja|880年}} ({{ill|Gangyō|ja|元慶}} 4), {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸島比賣命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }} On {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} of {{ill|1872|ja|1872年}} ({{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社}} under the {{ill|Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|ja|近代社格制度|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}. It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }} A {{ill|Mune-fuda|ja|棟札}} dated {{ill|August 14|ja|8月14日}}, 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.額田町史、pp.188-189 This plaque predates others such as the one from {{ill|qq22|ja|qq22年}} ({{ill|Hōan|ja|保安}} 3) at {{ill|Chūson-ji|ja|中尊寺}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}} However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity. The plaque was exhibited at the {{ill|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|ja|名古屋汎太平洋平和博覧会}} in {{ill|1937|ja|1937年}} ({{ill|Shōwa|ja|昭和}} 12). In {{ill|1894|ja|1894年}} (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in {{ill|1935|ja|1935年}} (Shōwa 10). A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}}, {{ill|2012|ja|2012年}} (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == {{main|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival}} == References == {{reflist}} {{脚注ヘルプ}} == Bibliography == * 『額田町史』額田町史編集委員会、{{ill|1986|ja|1986年}}qq月1日 * 『愛知縣額田郡誌（復刻版）』千秋社、{{ill|2003|ja|2003年}} * 『三河國額田郡誌（完）』愛知県額田郡役所、{{ill|1924|ja|1924年}}（原本） == See also == {{Commonscat|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} * {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}} * {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}} * {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡}} * {{ill|Toyotomi Village|ja|豊富村 (愛知県額田郡)}} * {{ill|Sakaeji Village|ja|栄枝村}} {{神道 横}} [[Category:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:qq]] {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |名称 = 夏山八幡宮 |image = [[File:Natsuyama-Hachiman-gû Shintô Shrine - Shaden.jpg|270px]]
社殿 |location = {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}{{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}{{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}}字宮本 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|56|30.1|N|137|18|40.3|E|region:JP-23_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=夏山八幡宮}} |deity = {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone}}, {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神}}, {{ill|Tagiri-hime|ja|多紀理姫命}}, {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸嶋姫命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多紀津姫命}}, {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = {{ill|Okazaki City Hall|ja|岡崎市役所}} |page = 40 }} |type = 郷社 |創建 = {{ill|531|ja|531年}}（{{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}25年） |本殿 = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|一間社流造}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = 岡崎市役所 |page = 206 }} |別名 = |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}} }} [[File:Natsuyama-Hachimangu-5.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}]] '''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}}, {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}, held in {{ill|October|ja|10月}}. == Overview == The shrine was established in {{ill|531|ja|531年}} (25th year of {{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone}}.愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353 In {{ill|880|ja|880年}} ({{ill|Gangyō|ja|元慶}} 4), {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸島比賣命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }} On {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} of {{ill|1872|ja|1872年}} ({{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社}} under the {{ill|Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|ja|近代社格制度|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}. It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }} A {{ill|Mune-fuda|ja|棟札}} dated {{ill|August 14|ja|8月14日}}, 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.額田町史、pp.188-189 This plaque predates others such as the one from {{ill|qq22|ja|qq22年}} ({{ill|Hōan|ja|保安}} 3) at {{ill|Chūson-ji|ja|中尊寺}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}} However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity. The plaque was exhibited at the {{ill|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|ja|名古屋汎太平洋平和博覧会}} in {{ill|1937|ja|1937年}} ({{ill|Shōwa|ja|昭和}} 12). In {{ill|1894|ja|1894年}} (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in {{ill|1935|ja|1935年}} (Shōwa 10). A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}}, {{ill|2012|ja|2012年}} (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == {{main|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival}} == References == {{reflist}} {{脚注ヘルプ}} == Bibliography == * 『額田町史』額田町史編集委員会、{{ill|1986|ja|1986年}}qq月1日 * 『愛知縣額田郡誌（復刻版）』千秋社、{{ill|2003|ja|2003年}} * 『三河國額田郡誌（完）』愛知県額田郡役所、{{ill|1924|ja|1924年}}（原本） == See also == {{Commonscat|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} * {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}} * {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}} * {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡}} * {{ill|Toyotomi Village|ja|豊富村 (愛知県額田郡)}} * {{ill|Sakaeji Village|ja|栄枝村}} {{神道 横}} [[Category:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:qq]] A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}}, {{ill|2012|ja|2012年}} (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == {{main|Natsuyama 社殿 |location = {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}{{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}{{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}}字宮本 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|56|30.1|N|137|18|40.3|E|region:JP-23_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=夏山八幡宮}} |deity = {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone}}, {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神}}, {{ill|Tagiri-hime|ja|多紀理姫命}}, {{ill|Ichikishimahime|ja|市寸嶋姫命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多紀津姫命}}, {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = {{ill|Okazaki City Hall|ja|岡崎市役所}} |page = 40 }} |type = 郷社 |創建 = {{ill|531|ja|531年}}（{{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}25年） |本殿 = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|一間社流造}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = 岡崎市役所 |page = 206 }} |別名 = |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}} }} [[File:Natsuyama-Hachimangu-5.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}]] '''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}}, {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}, held in {{ill|October|ja|10月}}. == Overview == The shrine was established in {{ill|531|ja|531年}} (25th year of {{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone}}.愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353 In {{ill|880|ja|880年}} ({{ill|Gangyō|ja|元慶}} 4), {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Ichikishimahime|ja|市寸島比賣命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }} On {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} of {{ill|1872|ja|1872年}} ({{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社}} under the {{ill|Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|ja|近代社格制度|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}. It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }} A {{ill|Mune-fuda|ja|棟札}} dated {{ill|August 14|ja|8月14日}}, 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.額田町史、pp.188-189 This plaque predates others such as the one from {{ill|1122|ja|1122年}} ({{ill|Hōan|ja|保安}} 3) at {{ill|Chūson-ji|ja|中尊寺}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}} However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity. The plaque was exhibited at the {{ill|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|ja|名古屋汎太平洋平和博覧会}} in {{ill|1937|ja|1937年}} ({{ill|Shōwa|ja|昭和}} 12). In {{ill|1894|ja|1894年}} (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in {{ill|1935|ja|1935年}} (Shōwa 10). A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}}, {{ill|2012|ja|2012年}} (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == {{main|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival}} == References == {{reflist}} {{脚注ヘルプ}} == Bibliography == * 『額田町史』額田町史編集委員会、{{ill|1986|ja|1986年}}11月1日 * 『愛知縣額田郡誌（復刻版）』千秋社、{{ill|2003|ja|2003年}} * 『三河國額田郡誌（完）』愛知県額田郡役所、{{ill|1924|ja|1924年}}（原本） == See also == {{Commonscat|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} * {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}} * {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}} * {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡}} * {{ill|Toyotomi Village|ja|豊富村 (愛知県額田郡)}} * {{ill|Sakaeji Village|ja|栄枝村}} {{神道 横}} [[Category:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:11]] {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |名称 = 夏山八幡宮 |image = [[File:Natsuyama-Hachiman-gû Shintô Shrine - Shaden.jpg|270px]]
社殿 |location = {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}{{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}{{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}}字宮本 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|56|30.1|N|137|18|40.3|E|region:JP-23_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=夏山八幡宮}} |deity = {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone}}, {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神}}, {{ill|Tagiri-hime|ja|多紀理姫命}}, {{ill|Ichikishimahime|ja|市寸嶋姫命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多紀津姫命}}, {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = {{ill|Okazaki City Hall|ja|岡崎市役所}} |page = 40 }} |type = 郷社 |創建 = {{ill|531|ja|531年}}（{{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}25年） |本殿 = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|一間社流造}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = 岡崎市役所 |page = 206 }} |別名 = |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}} }} [[File:Natsuyama-Hachimangu-5.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}]] '''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}}, {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}, held in {{ill|October|ja|10月}}. == Overview == The shrine was established in {{ill|531|ja|531年}} (25th year of {{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone}}.愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353 In {{ill|880|ja|880年}} ({{ill|Gangyō|ja|元慶}} 4), {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Ichikishimahime|ja|市寸島比賣命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }} On {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} of {{ill|1872|ja|1872年}} ({{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社}} under the {{ill|Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|ja|近代社格制度|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}. It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }} A {{ill|Mune-fuda|ja|棟札}} dated {{ill|August 14|ja|8月14日}}, 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.額田町史、pp.188-189 This plaque predates others such as the one from {{ill|1122|ja|1122年}} ({{ill|Hōan|ja|保安}} 3) at {{ill|Chūson-ji|ja|中尊寺}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}} However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity. The plaque was exhibited at the {{ill|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|ja|名古屋汎太平洋平和博覧会}} in {{ill|1937|ja|1937年}} ({{ill|Shōwa|ja|昭和}} 12). In {{ill|1894|ja|1894年}} (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in {{ill|1935|ja|1935年}} (Shōwa 10). A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}}, {{ill|2012|ja|2012年}} (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == {{main|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival}} == References == {{reflist}} {{脚注ヘルプ}} == Bibliography == * 『額田町史』額田町史編集委員会、{{ill|1986|ja|1986年}}11月1日 * 『愛知縣額田郡誌（復刻版）』千秋社、{{ill|2003|ja|2003年}} * 『三河國額田郡誌（完）』愛知県額田郡役所、{{ill|1924|ja|1924年}}（原本） == See also == {{Commonscat|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} * {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}} * {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}} * {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡}} * {{ill|Toyotomi Village|ja|豊富村 (愛知県額田郡)}} * {{ill|Sakaeji Village|ja|栄枝村}} {{神道 横}} [[Category:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:11]] {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |名称 = 夏山八幡宮 |image = [[File:Natsuyama-Hachiman-gû Shintô Shrine - Shaden.jpg|270px]]
社殿 |location = {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}{{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}{{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}}字宮本 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|56|30.1|N|137|18|40.3|E|region:JP-23_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=夏山八幡宮}} |deity = {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone}}, {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神}}, {{ill|Tagiri-hime|ja|多紀理姫命}}, {{ill|Ichikishimahime|ja|市寸嶋姫命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多紀津姫命}}, {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = {{ill|Okazaki City Hall|ja|岡崎市役所}} |page = 40 }} |type = 郷社 |創建 = {{ill|531|ja|531年}}（{{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}25年） |本殿 = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|一間社流造}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = 岡崎市役所 |page = 206 }} |別名 = |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}} }} [[File:Natsuyama-Hachimangu-5.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}]] '''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}}, {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}, held in {{ill|October|ja|10月}}. == Overview == The shrine was established in {{ill|531|ja|531年}} (25th year of {{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone}}.愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353 In {{ill|880|ja|880年}} ({{ill|Gangyō|ja|元慶}} 4), {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Ichikishimahime|ja|市寸島比賣命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }} On {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} of {{ill|1872|ja|1872年}} ({{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社}} under the {{ill|Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|ja|近代社格制度|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}. It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }} A {{ill|Mune-fuda|ja|棟札}} dated {{ill|August 14|ja|8月14日}}, 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.額田町史、pp.188-189 This plaque predates others such as the one from {{ill|1122|ja|1122年}} ({{ill|Hōan|ja|保安}} 3) at {{ill|Chūson-ji|ja|中尊寺}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}} However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity. The plaque was exhibited at the {{ill|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|ja|名古屋汎太平洋平和博覧会}} in {{ill|1937|ja|1937年}} ({{ill|Shōwa|ja|昭和}} 12). In {{ill|1894|ja|1894年}} (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in {{ill|1935|ja|1935年}} (Shōwa 10). A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}}, {{ill|2012|ja|2012年}} (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == {{main|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival}} == References == {{reflist}} {{脚注ヘルプ}} == Bibliography == * 『額田町史』額田町史編集委員会、{{ill|1986|ja|1986年}}11月1日 * 『愛知縣額田郡誌（復刻版）』千秋社、{{ill|2003|ja|2003年}} * 『三河國額田郡誌（完）』愛知県額田郡役所、{{ill|1924|ja|1924年}}（原本） == See also == {{Commonscat|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} * {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}} * {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}} * {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡}} * {{ill|Toyotomi 社殿 |location = {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}{{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}{{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}}字宮本 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|56|30.1|N|137|18|40.3|E|region:JP-23_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=夏山八幡宮}} |deity = {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone}}, {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神}}, {{ill|Tagiri-hime|ja|多紀理姫命}}, {{ill|Ichikishimahime|ja|市寸嶋姫命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多紀津姫命}}, {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = {{ill|Okazaki City Hall|ja|岡崎市役所}} |page = 40 }} |type = 郷社 |創建 = {{ill|531|ja|531年}}（{{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}25年） |本殿 = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|一間社流造}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = 岡崎市役所 |page = 206 }} |別名 = |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}} }} [[File:Natsuyama-Hachimangu-5.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}]] '''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}}, {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}, held in {{ill|October|ja|10月}}. == Overview == The shrine was established in {{ill|531|ja|531年}} (25th year of {{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone}}.愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353 In {{ill|880|ja|880年}} ({{ill|Gangyō|ja|元慶}} 4), {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Ichikishimahime|ja|市寸島比賣命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }} On {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} of {{ill|1872|ja|1872年}} ({{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社}} under the {{ill|Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|ja|近代社格制度|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}. It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }} A {{ill|Mune-fuda|ja|棟札}} dated {{ill|August 14|ja|8月14日}}, 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.額田町史、pp.188-189 This plaque predates others such as the one from {{ill|1122|ja|1122年}} ({{ill|Hōan|ja|保安}} 3) at {{ill|Chūson-ji|ja|中尊寺}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}} However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity. The plaque was exhibited at the {{ill|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|ja|名古屋汎太平洋平和博覧会}} in {{ill|1937|ja|1937年}} ({{ill|Shōwa|ja|昭和}} 12). In {{ill|1894|ja|1894年}} (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in {{ill|1935|ja|1935年}} (Shōwa 10). A ceremony celebrating the completion tier 2]][[Category: of a new worship hall was held on {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}}, {{ill|2012|ja|2012年}} (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == 社殿 |location = {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}{{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}{{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}}字宮本 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|56|30.1|N|137|18|40.3|E|region:JP-23_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=夏山八幡宮}} |deity = {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone}}, {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神}}, {{ill|Tagiri-hime|ja|多紀理姫命}}, {{ill|Ichikishimahime|ja|市寸嶋姫命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多紀津姫命}}, {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = {{ill|Okazaki City Hall|ja|岡崎市役所}} |page = 40 }} |type = 郷社 |創建 = {{ill|531|ja|531st year }}（{{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}25年） |本殿 = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|一間社流造}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = 岡崎市役所 |page = 206 }} |別名 = |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}} }} [[File:Natsuyama-Hachimangu-5.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}]] '''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}}, {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}, held in {{ill|October|ja|10月}}. == Overview == The shrine was established in {{ill|531|ja|531st year }} (25th year of {{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone}}.愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353 In {{ill|880|ja|880年}} ({{ill|Gangyō|ja|元慶}} 4), {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Ichikishimahime|ja|市寸島比賣命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }} On {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} of {{ill|1872|ja|1872年}} ({{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社}} under the {{ill|Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|ja|近代社格制度|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}. It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }} A {{ill|Mune-fuda|ja|棟札}} dated {{ill|August 14|ja|8月14日}}, 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.額田町史、pp.188-189 This plaque predates others such as the one from {{ill|1122|ja|1122年}} ({{ill|Hōan|ja|保安}} 3) at {{ill|Chūson-ji|ja|中尊寺}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}} However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity. The plaque was exhibited at the {{ill|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|ja|名古屋汎太平洋平和博覧会}} in {{ill|1937|ja|1937年}} ({{ill|Shōwa|ja|昭和}} 12). In {{ill|1894|ja|1894年}} (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in {{ill|1935|ja|1935年}} (Shōwa 10). A ceremony celebrating the completion tier 2]][[Category: of a new worship hall was held on {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}}, {{ill|2012|ja|2012年}} (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival ==
