社殿 |location = {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}{{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}{{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}}字宮本 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|56|30.1|N|137|18|40.3|E|region:JP-23_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=夏山八幡宮}} |deity = {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone}}, {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神}}, {{ill|Tagiri-hime|ja|多紀理姫命}}, {{ill|Ichikishimahime|ja|市寸嶋姫命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多紀津姫命}}, {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = {{ill|Okazaki City Hall|ja|岡崎市役所}} |page = 40 }} |type = 郷社 |創建 = {{ill|531|ja|531st year }}（{{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}25年） |本殿 = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|一間社流造}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = 岡崎市役所 |page = 206 }} |別名 = |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}} }} [[File:Natsuyama-Hachimangu-5.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}]] '''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}}, {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}, held in {{ill|October|ja|10月}}. == Overview == The shrine was established in {{ill|531|ja|531st year }} (25th year of {{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone}}.愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353 In {{ill|880|ja|880年}} ({{ill|Gangyō|ja|元慶}} 4), {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Ichikishimahime|ja|市寸島比賣命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }} On {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} of {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year }} ({{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社}} under the {{ill|Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|ja|近代社格制度|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}. It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }} A {{ill|Mune-fuda|ja|棟札}} dated {{ill|August 14|ja|8月14日}}, 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.額田町史、pp.188-189 This plaque predates others such as the one from {{ill|1122|ja|1122nd year }} ({{ill|Hōan|ja|保安}} 3) at {{ill|Chūson-ji|ja|中尊寺}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}} However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity. The plaque was exhibited at the {{ill|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|ja|名古屋汎太平洋平和博覧会}} in {{ill|1937|ja|1937年}} ({{ill|Shōwa|ja|昭和}} 12). In {{ill|1894|ja|1894年}} (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in {{ill|1935|ja|1935年}} (Shōwa 10). A ceremony celebrating the completion tier 2]][[Category: of a new worship hall was held on {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}}, {{ill|2012|ja|2012nd year }} (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire 社殿 |location = {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}{{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}{{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}}字宮本 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|56|30.1|N|137|18|40.3|E|region:JP-23_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=夏山八幡宮}} |deity = {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone}}, {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神}}, {{ill|Tagiri-hime|ja|多紀理姫命}}, {{ill|Ichikishimahime|ja|市寸嶋姫命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多紀津姫命}}, {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = {{ill|Okazaki City Hall|ja|岡崎市役所}} |page = 40 }} |type = 郷社 |創建 = {{ill|531|ja|531st year }}（{{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}25th year ） |本殿 = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|一間社流造}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = 岡崎市役所 |page = 206 }} |別名 = |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}} }} [[File:Natsuyama-Hachimangu-5.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}]] '''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}}, {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}, held in {{ill|October|ja|10月}}. == Overview == The shrine was established in {{ill|531|ja|531st year }} (25th year of {{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone}}.愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353 In {{ill|880|ja|880年}} ({{ill|Gangyō|ja|元慶}} 4), {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Ichikishimahime|ja|市寸島比賣命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }} On {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} of {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year }} ({{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社}} under the {{ill|Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|ja|近代社格制度|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}. It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }} A {{ill|Mune-fuda|ja|棟札}} dated {{ill|August 14|ja|8月14日}}, 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.額田町史、pp.188-189 This plaque predates others such as the one from {{ill|1122|ja|1122nd year }} ({{ill|Hōan|ja|保安}} 3) at {{ill|Chūson-ji|ja|中尊寺}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}} However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity. The plaque was exhibited at the {{ill|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|ja|名古屋汎太平洋平和博覧会}} in {{ill|1937|ja|1937年}} ({{ill|Shōwa|ja|昭和}} 12). In {{ill|1894|ja|1894th year }} (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in {{ill|1935|ja|1935th year }} (Shōwa 10). A ceremony celebrating the completion tier 2]][[Category: of a new worship hall was held on {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}}, {{ill|2012|ja|2012nd year }} (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire 社殿 |location = {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}{{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}{{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}}字宮本 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|56|30.1|N|137|18|40.3|E|region:JP-23_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=夏山八幡宮}} |deity = {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone}}, {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神}}, {{ill|Tagiri-hime|ja|多紀理姫命}}, {{ill|Ichikishimahime|ja|市寸嶋姫命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多紀津姫命}}, {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = {{ill|Okazaki City Hall|ja|岡崎市役所}} |page = 40 }} |type = 郷社 |創建 = {{ill|531|ja|531st year }}（{{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}25th year ） |本殿 = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|一間社流造}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = 岡崎市役所 |page = 206 }} |別名 = |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}} }} [[File:Natsuyama-Hachimangu-5.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}]] '''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}}, {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}, held in {{ill|October|ja|10月}}. == Overview == The shrine was established in {{ill|531|ja|531st year }} (25th year of {{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone}}.愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353 In {{ill|880|ja|880th year }} ({{ill|Gangyō|ja|元慶}} 4), {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Ichikishimahime|ja|市寸島比賣命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }} On {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} of {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year }} ({{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社}} under the {{ill|Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|ja|近代社格制度|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}. It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }} A {{ill|Mune-fuda|ja|棟札}} dated {{ill|August 14|ja|8月14日}}, 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.額田町史、pp.188-189 This plaque predates others such as the one from {{ill|1122|ja|1122nd year }} ({{ill|Hōan|ja|保安}} 3) at {{ill|Chūson-ji|ja|中尊寺}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}} However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity. The plaque was exhibited at the {{ill|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|ja|名古屋汎太平洋平和博覧会}} in {{ill|1937|ja|1937th year }} ({{ill|Shōwa|ja|昭和}} 12). In {{ill|1894|ja|1894th year }} (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in {{ill|1935|ja|1935th year }} (Shōwa 10). A ceremony celebrating the completion tier 2]][[Category: of a new worship hall was held on {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}}, {{ill|2012|ja|2012nd year }} (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire 社殿 |location = {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}{{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}{{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}}字宮本 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|56|30.1|N|137|18|40.3|E|region:JP-23_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=夏山八幡宮}} |deity = {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone}}, {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神}}, {{ill|Tagiri-hime|ja|多紀理姫命}}, {{ill|Ichikishimahime|ja|市寸嶋姫命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多紀津姫命}}, {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = {{ill|Okazaki City Hall|ja|岡崎市役所}} |page = 40 }} |type = 郷社 |創建 = {{ill|531|ja|531st year }}（{{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}25th year ） |本殿 = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|一間社流造}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = 岡崎市役所 |page = 206 }} |別名 = |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}} }} [[File:Natsuyama-Hachimangu-5.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}]] '''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}}, {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}, held in {{ill|October|ja|10月}}. == Overview == The shrine was established in {{ill|531|ja|531st year }} (25th year of {{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone}}.愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353 In {{ill|880|ja|880th year }} ({{ill|Gangyō|ja|元慶}} 4), {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Ichikishimahime|ja|市寸島比賣命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }} On {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} of {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year }} ({{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社}} under the {{ill|Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|ja|近代社格制度|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}. It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }} A {{ill|Mune-fuda|ja|棟札}} dated {{ill|August 14|ja|8月14日}}, 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.額田町史、pp.188-189 This plaque predates others such as the one from {{ill|1122|ja|1122nd year }} ({{ill|Hōan|ja|保安}} 3) at {{ill|Chūson-ji|ja|中尊寺}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}} However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity. The plaque was exhibited at the {{ill|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|ja|名古屋汎太平洋平和博覧会}} in {{ill|1937|ja|1937th year }} ({{ill|Shōwa|ja|昭和}} 12). In {{ill|1894|ja|1894th year }} (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in {{ill|1935|ja|1935th year }} (Shōwa 10). A ceremony celebrating the completion tier 2]][[Category: of a new worship hall was held on {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}}, {{ill|2012|ja|2012nd year }} (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == {{main|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival}} == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * 『額田町史』額田町史編集委員会、{{ill|1986|ja|1986th year }}11月1日 * 『愛知縣額田郡誌（復刻版）』千秋社、{{ill|2003|ja|2003rd year }} * 『三河國額田郡誌（完）』愛知県額田郡役所、{{ill|1924|ja|1924th year }}（原本） == See also == {{Commonscat|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} * {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}} * {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}} * {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡}} * {{ill|Toyotomi Village|ja|豊富村 (愛知県額田郡)}} * {{ill|Sakaeji Village|ja|栄枝村}} {{神道 横}} [[Category:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:Completion tier 2]][[Category: tier 2]] {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |名称 = 夏山八幡宮 |image = [[File:Natsuyama-Hachiman-gû Shintô Shrine - Shaden.jpg|270px]]
社殿 |location = {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}{{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}{{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}}字宮本 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|56|30.1|N|137|18|40.3|E|region:JP-23_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=夏山八幡宮}} |deity = {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone}}, {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神}}, {{ill|Tagiri-hime|ja|多紀理姫命}}, {{ill|Ichikishimahime|ja|市寸嶋姫命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多紀津姫命}}, {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = {{ill|Okazaki City Hall|ja|岡崎市役所}} |page = 40 }} |type = 郷社 |創建 = {{ill|531|ja|531st year }}（{{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}25th year ） |本殿 = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|一間社流造}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = 岡崎市役所 |page = 206 }} |別名 = |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}} }} [[File:Natsuyama-Hachimangu-5.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}]] '''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}}, {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}, held in {{ill|October|ja|10月}}. == Overview == The shrine was established in {{ill|531|ja|531st year }} (25th year of {{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone}}.愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353 In {{ill|880|ja|880th year }} ({{ill|Gangyō|ja|元慶}} 4), {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Ichikishimahime|ja|市寸島比賣命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }} On {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} of {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year }} ({{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社}} under the {{ill|Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|ja|近代社格制度|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}. It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }} A {{ill|Mune-fuda|ja|棟札}} dated {{ill|August 14|ja|8月14日}}, 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.額田町史、pp.188-189 This plaque predates others such as the one from {{ill|1122|ja|1122nd year }} ({{ill|Hōan|ja|保安}} 3) at {{ill|Chūson-ji|ja|中尊寺}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}} However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity. The plaque was exhibited at the {{ill|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|ja|名古屋汎太平洋平和博覧会}} in {{ill|1937|ja|1937th year }} ({{ill|Shōwa|ja|昭和}} 12). In {{ill|1894|ja|1894th year }} (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in {{ill|1935|ja|1935th year }} (Shōwa 10). A ceremony celebrating the completion tier 2]][[Category: of a new worship hall was held on {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}}, {{ill|2012|ja|2012nd year }} (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == {{main|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival}} == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * 『額田町史』額田町史編集委員会、{{ill|1986|ja|1986th year }}11月1日 * 『愛知縣額田郡誌（復刻版）』千秋社、{{ill|2003|ja|2003rd year }} * 『三河國額田郡誌（完）』愛知県額田郡役所、{{ill|1924|ja|1924th year }}（原本） == See also == {{Commonscat|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} * {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}} * {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}} * {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡}} * {{ill|Toyotomi Village|ja|豊富村 (愛知県額田郡)}} * {{ill|Sakaeji Village|ja|栄枝村}} {{神道 横}} [[Category:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:Completion tier 2]][[Category: tier 2]] It was later renamed to its current name.{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }} On {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} of {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year }} ({{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社}} under the {{ill|Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|ja|近代社格制度|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}. It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }} A {{ill|Mune-fuda|ja|棟札}} dated {{ill|August 14|ja|8月14日}}, 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.額田町史、pp.188-189 This plaque predates others such as the one from {{ill|1122|ja|1122nd year }} ({{ill|Hōan|ja|保安}} 3) at {{ill|Chūson-ji|ja|中尊寺}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}} However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity. The plaque was exhibited at the {{ill|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|ja|名古屋汎太平洋平和博覧会}} in {{ill|1937|ja|1937th year }} ({{ill|Shōwa|ja|昭和}} 12). In {{ill|1894|ja|1894th year }} (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in {{ill|1935|ja|1935th year }} (Shōwa 10). A ceremony celebrating the completion tier 2]][[Category: of a new worship hall was held on {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}}, {{ill|2012|ja|2012nd year }} (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |名称 = 夏山八幡宮 |image = [[File:Natsuyama-Hachiman-gû Shintô Shrine - Shaden.jpg|270px]]
社殿 |location = {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}{{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}{{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}}字宮本 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|56|30.1|N|137|18|40.3|E|region:JP-23_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=夏山八幡宮}} |deity = {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone}}, {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神}}, {{ill|Tagiri-hime|ja|多紀理姫命}}, {{ill|Ichikishimahime|ja|市寸嶋姫命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多紀津姫命}}, {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = {{ill|Okazaki City Hall|ja|岡崎市役所}} |page = 40 }} |type = 郷社 |創建 = {{ill|531|ja|531st year }}（{{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}25th year ） |本殿 = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|一間社流造}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = 岡崎市役所 |page = 206 }} |別名 = |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}} }} [[File:Natsuyama-Hachimangu-5.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}]] '''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}}, {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}, held in {{ill|October|ja|10月}}. == Overview == The shrine was established in {{ill|531|ja|531st year }} (25th year of {{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone}}.愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353 In {{ill|880|ja|880th year }} ({{ill|Gangyō|ja|元慶}} 4), {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Ichikishimahime|ja|市寸島比賣命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }} On {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} of {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year }} ({{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社}} under the {{ill|Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|ja|近代社格制度|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}. It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }} A {{ill|Mune-fuda|ja|棟札}} dated {{ill|August 14|ja|8月14日}}, 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.額田町史、pp.188-189 This plaque predates others such as the one from {{ill|1122|ja|1122nd year }} ({{ill|Hōan|ja|保安}} 3) at {{ill|Chūson-ji|ja|中尊寺}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}} However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity. The plaque was exhibited at the {{ill|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|ja|名古屋汎太平洋平和博覧会}} in {{ill|1937|ja|1937th year }} ({{ill|Shōwa|ja|昭和}} 12). In {{ill|1894|ja|1894th year }} (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in {{ill|1935|ja|1935th year }} (Shōwa 10). A ceremony celebrating the completion tier 2]] {{draft categories| [[Category: of a new worship hall was held on {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}}, {{ill|2012|ja|2012nd year }} (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == {{main|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival}} == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * 『額田町史』額田町史編集委員会、{{ill|1986|ja|1986th year }}11月1日 * 『愛知縣額田郡誌（復刻版）』千秋社、{{ill|2003|ja|2003rd year }} * 『三河國額田郡誌（完）』愛知県額田郡役所、{{ill|1924|ja|1924th year }}（原本） == See also == {{Commonscat|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} * {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}} * {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}} * {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡}} * {{ill|Toyotomi Village|ja|豊富村 (愛知県額田郡)}} * {{ill|Sakaeji Village|ja|栄枝村}} {{神道 横}} [[Category:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Hachiman shrines]] [[Category:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[Category:Former Gōsha shrines]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] }} [[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[sn:atsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[ja:夏山八幡宮]] [[en:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine}}

It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|12=draft}}, held in {{ill|October|ja|10月|12=draft}}. == Overview == The shrine was established in {{ill|531|ja|531st year|12=draft}} (25th year of {{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇|12=draft}}) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone|12=draft}}.愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353 In {{ill|880|ja|880th year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Gangyō|ja|元慶|12=draft}} 4), {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇|12=draft}}, {{ill|Ichikishimahime|ja|市寸島比賣命|12=draft}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神|12=draft}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神|12=draft}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }} On {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日|12=draft}} of {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}} 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|12=draft}} under the {{ill|Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|ja|近代社格制度|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=draft}}. It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡|12=draft}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }} A {{ill|Mune-fuda|ja|棟札|12=draft}} dated {{ill|August 14|ja|8月14日|12=draft}}, 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.額田町史、pp.188-189 This plaque predates others such as the one from {{ill|1122|ja|1122nd year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Hōan|ja|保安|12=draft}} 3) at {{ill|Chūson-ji|ja|中尊寺|12=draft}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}} However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity. The plaque was exhibited at the {{ill|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|ja|名古屋汎太平洋平和博覧会|12=draft}} in {{ill|1937|ja|1937th year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Shōwa|ja|昭和|12=draft}} 12). In {{ill|1894|ja|1894th year|12=draft}} (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造|12=draft}} style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in {{ill|1935|ja|1935th year|12=draft}} (Shōwa 10). A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日|12=draft}}, {{ill|2012|ja|2012nd year|12=draft}} (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == {{main|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival}} == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * 『額田町史』額田町史編集委員会、{{ill|1986|ja|1986th year|12=draft}}11月1日 * 『愛知縣額田郡誌（復刻版）』千秋社、{{ill|2003|ja|2003rd year|12=draft}} * 『三河國額田郡誌（完）』愛知県額田郡役所、{{ill|1924|ja|1924th year|12=draft}}（原本） == See also == {{Commonscat|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} * {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市|12=draft}} * {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|12=draft}} * {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡|12=draft}} * {{ill|Toyotomi Village|ja|豊富村 (愛知県額田郡)|12=draft}} * {{ill|Sakaeji Village|ja|栄枝村|12=draft}} {{神道 横}} [[Category:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Hachiman shrines]] [[Category:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[Category:Former Gōsha shrines]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] }} [[Category:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Hachiman shrines]] [[Category:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[Category:Former Gōsha shrines]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] {{draft categories| [[Category: [[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[sn:atsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[ja:夏山八幡宮]] [[en:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine}}

{{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |名称 = 夏山八幡宮 |image = [[File:Natsuyama-Hachiman-gû Shintô Shrine - Shaden.jpg|270px]]
社殿 |location = {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県|12=draft}}{{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市|12=draft}}{{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|12=draft}}字宮本 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|56|30.1|N|137|18|40.3|E|region:JP-23_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=夏山八幡宮}} |deity = {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇|12=draft}}, {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone|12=draft}}, {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神|12=draft}}, {{ill|Tagiri-hime|ja|多紀理姫命|12=draft}}, {{ill|Ichikishimahime|ja|市寸嶋姫命|12=draft}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多紀津姫命|12=draft}}, {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神|12=draft}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = {{ill|Okazaki City Hall|ja|岡崎市役所|12=draft}} |page = 40 }} |type = 郷社 |創建 = {{ill|531|ja|531st year|12=draft}}（{{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇|12=draft}}25th year ） |本殿 = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|一間社流造|12=draft}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = 岡崎市役所 |page = 206 }} |別名 = |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|12=draft}} }} [[File:Natsuyama-Hachimangu-5.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|12=draft}}]] '''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|12=draft}}, {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県|12=draft}}. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|12=draft}}, held in {{ill|October|ja|10月|12=draft}}. == Overview == The shrine was established in {{ill|531|ja|531st year|12=draft}} (25th year of {{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇|12=draft}}) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone|12=draft}}.愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353 In {{ill|880|ja|880th year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Gangyō|ja|元慶|12=draft}} 4), {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇|12=draft}}, {{ill|Ichikishimahime|ja|市寸島比賣命|12=draft}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神|12=draft}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神|12=draft}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }} On {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日|12=draft}} of {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}} 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|12=draft}} under the {{ill|Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|ja|近代社格制度|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=draft}}. It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡|12=draft}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }} A {{ill|Mune-fuda|ja|棟札|12=draft}} dated {{ill|August 14|ja|8月14日|12=draft}}, 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.額田町史、pp.188-189 This plaque predates others such as the one from {{ill|1122|ja|1122nd year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Hōan|ja|保安|12=draft}} 3) at {{ill|Chūson-ji|ja|中尊寺|12=draft}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}} However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity. The plaque was exhibited at the {{ill|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|ja|名古屋汎太平洋平和博覧会|12=draft}} in {{ill|1937|ja|1937th year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Shōwa|ja|昭和|12=draft}} 12). In {{ill|1894|ja|1894th year|12=draft}} (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造|12=draft}} style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in {{ill|1935|ja|1935th year|12=draft}} (Shōwa 10). A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日|12=draft}}, {{ill|2012|ja|2012nd year|12=draft}} (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == {{main|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival}} == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * 『額田町史』額田町史編集委員会、{{ill|1986|ja|1986th year|12=draft}}11月1日 * 『愛知縣額田郡誌（復刻版）』千秋社、{{ill|2003|ja|2003rd year|12=draft}} * 『三河國額田郡誌（完）』愛知県額田郡役所、{{ill|1924|ja|1924th year|12=draft}}（原本） == See also == {{Commonscat|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} * {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市|12=draft}} * {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|12=draft}} * {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡|12=draft}} * {{ill|Toyotomi Village|ja|豊富村 (愛知県額田郡)|12=draft}} * {{ill|Sakaeji Village|ja|栄枝村|12=draft}} {{神道 横}} [[Category:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Hachiman shrines]] [[Category:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[Category:Former Gōsha shrines]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] }} [[Category:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Hachiman shrines]] [[Category:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[Category:Former Gōsha shrines]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] {{draft categories| [[Category: [[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[sn:atsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[ja:夏山八幡宮]] [[en:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine}}

It was later renamed to its current name.{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }} On {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日|12=draft}} of {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}} 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|12=draft}} under the {{ill|Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|ja|近代社格制度|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=draft}}. It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡|12=draft}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }} A {{ill|Mune-fuda|ja|棟札|12=draft}} dated {{ill|August 14|ja|8月14日|12=draft}}, 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.額田町史、pp.188-189 This plaque predates others such as the one from {{ill|1122|ja|1122nd year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Hōan|ja|保安|12=draft}} 3) at {{ill|Chūson-ji|ja|中尊寺|12=draft}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}} However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity. It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡|12=draft}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }} A {{ill|Mune-fuda|ja|棟札|12=draft}} dated {{ill|August 14|ja|8月14日|12=draft}}, 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.額田町史、pp.188-189 This plaque predates others such as the one from {{ill|1122|ja|1122nd year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Hōan|ja|保安|12=draft}} 3) at {{ill|Chūson-ji|ja|中尊寺|12=draft}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}} However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity. The plaque was exhibited at the {{ill|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|ja|名古屋汎太平洋平和博覧会|12=draft}} in {{ill|1937|ja|1937th year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Shōwa|ja|昭和|12=draft}} 12). In {{ill|1894|ja|1894th year|12=draft}} (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造|12=draft}} style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in {{ill|1935|ja|1935th year|12=draft}} (Shōwa 10). A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日|12=draft}}, {{ill|2012|ja|2012nd year|12=draft}} (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == {{main|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival}} == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * 『額田町史』額田町史編集委員会、{{ill|1986|ja|1986th year|12=draft}}11月1日 * 『愛知縣額田郡誌（復刻版）』千秋社、{{ill|2003|ja|2003rd year|12=draft}} * 『三河國額田郡誌（完）』愛知県額田郡役所、{{ill|1924|ja|1924th year|12=draft}}（原本） == See also == {{Commonscat|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} * {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市|12=draft}} * {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|12=draft}} * {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡|12=draft}} * {{ill|Toyotomi Village|ja|豊富村 (愛知県額田郡)|12=draft}} * {{ill|Sakaeji Village|ja|栄枝村|12=draft}} {{神道 横}} [[Category:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Hachiman shrines]] [[Category:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[Category:Former Gōsha shrines]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:New]] }} [[Category:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Hachiman shrines]] [[Category:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[Category:Former Gōsha shrines]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:New]] {{draft categories| [[Category: [[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[sn:atsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[ja:夏山八幡宮]] [[en:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine}}

{{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |名称 = 夏山八幡宮 |image = [[File:Natsuyama-Hachiman-gû Shintô Shrine - Shaden.jpg|270px]]
社殿 |location = {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県|12=draft}}{{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市|12=draft}}{{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|12=draft}}字宮本 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|56|30.1|N|137|18|40.3|E|region:JP-23_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=夏山八幡宮}} |deity = {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇|12=draft}}, {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone|12=draft}}, {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神|12=draft}}, {{ill|Tagiri-hime|ja|多紀理姫命|12=draft}}, {{ill|Ichikishimahime|ja|市寸嶋姫命|12=draft}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多紀津姫命|12=draft}}, {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神|12=draft}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = {{ill|Okazaki City Hall|ja|岡崎市役所|12=draft}} |page = 40 }} |type = 郷社 |創建 = {{ill|531|ja|531st year|12=draft}}（{{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇|12=draft}}25th year ） |本殿 = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|一間社流造|12=draft}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = 岡崎市役所 |page = 206 }} |別名 = |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|12=draft}} }} [[File:Natsuyama-Hachimangu-5.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|12=draft}}]] '''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|12=draft}}, {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県|12=draft}}. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|12=draft}}, held in {{ill|October|ja|10月|12=draft}}. == Overview == The shrine was established in {{ill|531|ja|531st year|12=draft}} (25th year of {{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇|12=draft}}) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone|12=draft}}.愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353 In {{ill|880|ja|880th year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Gangyō|ja|元慶|12=draft}} 4), {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇|12=draft}}, {{ill|Ichikishimahime|ja|市寸島比賣命|12=draft}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神|12=draft}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神|12=draft}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }} On {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日|12=draft}} of {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}} 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|12=draft}} under the {{ill|Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|ja|近代社格制度|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=draft}}. It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡|12=draft}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }} A {{ill|Mune-fuda|ja|棟札|12=draft}} dated {{ill|August 14|ja|8月14日|12=draft}}, 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.額田町史、pp.188-189 This plaque predates others such as the one from {{ill|1122|ja|1122nd year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Hōan|ja|保安|12=draft}} 3) at {{ill|Chūson-ji|ja|中尊寺|12=draft}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}} However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity. The plaque was exhibited at the {{ill|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|ja|名古屋汎太平洋平和博覧会|12=draft}} in {{ill|1937|ja|1937th year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Shōwa|ja|昭和|12=draft}} 12). In {{ill|1894|ja|1894th year|12=draft}} (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造|12=draft}} style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in {{ill|1935|ja|1935th year|12=draft}} (Shōwa 10). A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日|12=draft}}, {{ill|2012|ja|2012nd year|12=draft}} (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == {{main|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival}} == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * 『額田町史』額田町史編集委員会、{{ill|1986|ja|1986th year|12=draft}}11月1日 * 『愛知縣額田郡誌（復刻版）』千秋社、{{ill|2003|ja|2003rd year|12=draft}} * 『三河國額田郡誌（完）』愛知県額田郡役所、{{ill|1924|ja|1924th year|12=draft}}（原本） == See also == {{Commonscat|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} * {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市|12=draft}} * {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|12=draft}} * {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡|12=draft}} * {{ill|Toyotomi Village|ja|豊富村 (愛知県額田郡)|12=draft}} * {{ill|Sakaeji Village|ja|栄枝村|12=draft}} {{神道 横}} [[Category:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Hachiman shrines]] [[Category:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[Category:Former Gōsha shrines]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:New]] }} [[Category:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Hachiman shrines]] [[Category:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[Category:Former Gōsha shrines]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:New]] {{draft categories| [[Category: [[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[sn:atsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[ja:夏山八幡宮]] [[en:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine}}

社殿 |location = {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県|12=draft|12=draft}}{{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市|12=draft|12=draft}}{{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|12=draft|12=draft}}字宮本 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|56|30.1|N|137|18|40.3|E|region:JP-23_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=夏山八幡宮}} |deity = {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神|1=Amaterasu|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Tagiri-hime|ja|多紀理姫命|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Ichikishimahime|ja|市寸嶋姫命|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多紀津姫命|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神|12=draft|12=draft}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = {{ill|Okazaki City Hall|ja|岡崎市役所|12=draft|12=draft}} |page = 40 }} |type = 郷社 |創建 = {{ill|531|ja|531st year|12=draft|12=draft}}（{{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇|12=draft|12=draft}}25th year ） |本殿 = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|一間社流造|12=draft|12=draft}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = 岡崎市役所 |page = 206 }} |別名 = |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|12=draft|12=draft}} }} [[File:Natsuyama-Hachimangu-5.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|12=draft|12=draft}}]] '''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|12=draft|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県|12=draft|12=draft}}. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|12=draft|12=draft}}, held in {{ill|October|ja|10月|12=draft|12=draft}}. == Overview == The shrine was established in {{ill|531|ja|531st year|12=draft|12=draft}} (25th year of {{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇|12=draft|12=draft}}) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone|12=draft|12=draft}}.愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353 In {{ill|880|ja|880th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ({{ill|Gangyō|ja|元慶|12=draft|12=draft}} 4), {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Ichikishimahime|ja|市寸島比賣命|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神|12=draft|12=draft}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神|12=draft|12=draft}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }} On {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日|12=draft|12=draft}} of {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ({{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft}} 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|12=draft|12=draft}} under the {{ill|Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|ja|近代社格制度|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=draft|12=draft}}. It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡|12=draft|12=draft}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }} A {{ill|Mune-fuda|ja|棟札|12=draft|12=draft}} dated {{ill|August 14|ja|8月14日|12=draft|12=draft}}, 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.額田町史、pp.188-189 This plaque predates others such as the one from {{ill|1122|ja|1122nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ({{ill|Hōan|ja|保安|12=draft|12=draft}} 3) at {{ill|Chūson-ji|ja|中尊寺|12=draft|12=draft}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}} However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity. The plaque was exhibited at the {{ill|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|ja|名古屋汎太平洋平和博覧会|12=draft|12=draft}} in {{ill|1937|ja|1937th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ({{ill|Shōwa|ja|昭和|12=draft|12=draft}} 12). In {{ill|1894|ja|1894th year|12=draft|12=draft}} (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造|12=draft|12=draft}} style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in {{ill|1935|ja|1935th year|12=draft|12=draft}} (Shōwa 10). A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|2012|ja|2012nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == {{main|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival}} == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * 『額田町史』額田町史編集委員会、{{ill|1986|ja|1986th year|12=draft|12=draft}}11月1日 * 『愛知縣額田郡誌（復刻版）』千秋社、{{ill|2003|ja|2003rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} * 『三河國額田郡誌（完）』愛知県額田郡役所、{{ill|1924|ja|1924th year|12=draft|12=draft}}（原本） == See also == {{Commonscat|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} * {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Toyotomi Village|ja|豊富村 (愛知県額田郡)|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Sakaeji Village|ja|栄枝村|12=draft|12=draft}} {{神道 横}} }} {{draft categories| {{draft categories| [[Category:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Hachiman shrines]] [[Category:Former Gōsha shrines]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:New]] [[Category: [[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] }} [[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[sn:atsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[ja:夏山八幡宮]] [[en:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine}}

In {{ill|1894|ja|1894th year|12=draft|12=draft}} (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造|12=draft|12=draft}} style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in {{ill|1935|ja|1935th year|12=draft|12=draft}} (Shōwa 10). A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|2012|ja|2012nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == {{main|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival}} == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * 『額田町史』額田町史編集委員会、{{ill|1986|ja|1986th year|12=draft|12=draft}}11月1日 * 『愛知縣額田郡誌（復刻版）』千秋社、{{ill|2003|ja|2003rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} * 『三河國額田郡誌（完）』愛知県額田郡役所、{{ill|1924|ja|1924th year|12=draft|12=draft}}（原本） == See also == {{Commonscat|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} * {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Toyotomi Village|ja|豊富村 (愛知県額田郡)|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Sakaeji Village|ja|栄枝村|12=draft|12=draft}} {{神道 横}} }} {{draft categories| {{draft categories| [[Category:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Hachiman shrines]] [[Category:Former Gōsha shrines]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:New]] [[Category: [[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] }} [[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[sn:atsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[ja:夏山八幡宮]] [[en:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine}}

{{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |名称 = 夏山八幡宮 |image = [[File:Natsuyama-Hachiman-gû Shintô Shrine - Shaden.jpg|270px]]
社殿 |location = {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}{{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}{{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}}字宮本 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|56|30.1|N|137|18|40.3|E|region:JP-23_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=夏山八幡宮}} |deity = {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone}}, {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神|1=Amaterasu|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami}}, {{ill|Tagiri-hime|ja|多紀理姫命}}, {{ill|Ichikishimahime|ja|市寸嶋姫命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多紀津姫命}}, {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = {{ill|Okazaki City Hall|ja|岡崎市役所}} |page = 40 }} |type = 郷社 |創建 = {{ill|531|ja|531st year}}（{{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}25th year ） |本殿 = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|一間社流造}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = 岡崎市役所 |page = 206 }} |別名 = |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}} }} [[File:Natsuyama-Hachimangu-5.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}]] '''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}}, {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}, held in {{ill|October|ja|10月}}. == Overview == The shrine was established in {{ill|531|ja|531st year}} (25th year of {{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone}}.愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353 In {{ill|880|ja|880th year}} ({{ill|Gangyō|ja|元慶}} 4), {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Ichikishimahime|ja|市寸島比賣命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }} On {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} of {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year}} ({{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|1=Meiji era}} 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社}} under the {{ill|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|ja|近代社格制度|1=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines}}. It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }} A {{ill|Mune-fuda|ja|棟札}} dated {{ill|August 14|ja|8月14日}}, 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.額田町史、pp.188-189 This plaque predates others such as the one from {{ill|1122|ja|1122nd year}} ({{ill|Hōan|ja|保安}} 3) at {{ill|Chūson-ji|ja|中尊寺}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}} However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity. The plaque was exhibited at the {{ill|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|ja|名古屋汎太平洋平和博覧会}} in {{ill|1937|ja|1937th year}} ({{ill|Shōwa|ja|昭和}} 12). In {{ill|1894|ja|1894th year}} (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in {{ill|1935|ja|1935th year}} (Shōwa 10). A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}}, {{ill|2012|ja|2012nd year}} (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == {{main|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival}} == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * 『額田町史』額田町史編集委員会、{{ill|1986|ja|1986th year}}11月1日 * 『愛知縣額田郡誌（復刻版）』千秋社、{{ill|2003|ja|2003rd year}} * 『三河國額田郡誌（完）』愛知県額田郡役所、{{ill|1924|ja|1924th year}}（原本） == See also == {{Commonscat|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} * {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}} * {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}} * {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡}} * {{ill|Toyotomi Village|ja|豊富村 (愛知県額田郡)}} * {{ill|Sakaeji Village|ja|栄枝村}} {{神道 横}} }} {{draft categories| {{draft categories| [[Category:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Hachiman shrines]] [[Category:Former Gōsha shrines]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:New]] [[Category: [[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] }} [[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[sn:atsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[ja:夏山八幡宮]] [[en:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine}}

It was later renamed to its current name.{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }} On {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} of {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year}} ({{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|1=Meiji era}} 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社}} under the {{ill|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|ja|近代社格制度|1=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines}}. It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }} A {{ill|Mune-fuda|ja|棟札}} dated {{ill|August 14|ja|8月14日}}, 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.額田町史、pp.188-189 This plaque predates others such as the one from {{ill|1122|ja|1122nd year}} ({{ill|Hōan|ja|保安}} 3) at {{ill|Chūson-ji|ja|中尊寺}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}} However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity. In {{ill|1894|ja|1894th year}} (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in {{ill|1935|ja|1935th year}} (Shōwa 10). A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}}, {{ill|2012|ja|2012nd year}} (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == {{main|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival}} == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * 『額田町史』額田町史編集委員会、{{ill|1986|ja|1986th year}}11月1日 * 『愛知縣額田郡誌（復刻版）』千秋社、{{ill|2003|ja|2003rd year}} * 『三河國額田郡誌（完）』愛知県額田郡役所、{{ill|1924|ja|1924th year}}（原本） == See also == {{Commonscat|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} * {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}} * {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}} * {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡}} * {{ill|Toyotomi Village|ja|豊富村 (愛知県額田郡)}} * {{ill|Sakaeji Village|ja|栄枝村}} {{神道 横}} }} {{draft categories| {{draft categories| [[Category:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Hachiman shrines]] [[Category:Former Gōsha shrines]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:New]] [[Category: [[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] }} [[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[sn:atsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[ja:夏山八幡宮]] [[en:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine}}

revision.comment: 37 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:夏山八幡宮 up to rev 97794083
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 夏山八幡宮 |画像 = [[ファイル:Natsuyama-Hachiman-gû Shintô Shrine - Shaden.jpg|270px]]
社殿 |所在地 = [[愛知県]][[岡崎市]][[夏山町]]字宮本 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|56|30.1|N|137|18|40.3|E|region:JP-23_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=夏山八幡宮}} |祭神 = [[応神天皇]]、天津日子根命、[[天照大神]]、多紀理姫命、市寸嶋姫命、多紀津姫命、[[住吉三神|住吉大神]]{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = [[岡崎市役所]] |page = 40 }} |社格 = 郷社 |創建 = [[継体天皇]]25年（[[531年]]） |本殿 = 一間社流造{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = 岡崎市役所 |page = 206 }} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = [[夏山八幡宮火祭り]] }} [[File:Natsuyama-Hachimangu-5.jpg|thumb|250px|right|[[夏山八幡宮火祭り]]]] '''夏山八幡宮'''（なつやまはちまんぐう）は、[[愛知県]][[岡崎市]][[夏山町]]にある[[神社]]。[[10月]]に行われる[[夏山八幡宮火祭り|火祭り]]で知られる。 == 概要 == [[531年]]（[[継体天皇]]25年）に[[アマツヒコネ|天津日子根命]]を祀ったのが始まりとされる愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353。 [[880年]]（[[元慶]]4年）、[[応神天皇]]、[[イチキシマヒメ|市寸島比賣命]]、[[タギツヒメ|多岐都比賣神]]、[[住吉三神|住吉大神]]を合祀し、'''王宮八幡宮'''と称したが、のちに現在の名前に改められたという{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }}。 [[1872年]]（[[明治]]5年）[[10月3日 (旧暦)|10月3日]]、[[近代社格制度]]に基づき郷社に列した。[[額田郡]]の祖神を祀る神社とされる{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }}。 同社には880年（元慶4年）[[8月14日]]の日付がある[[棟札]]が現存しており建立時期を示す史料とされる額田町史、pp.188-189。現在、日本最古とされる棟札は[[中尊寺]]に伝わる[[1122年]]（[[保安 (元号)|保安]]3年）のものとされるが、文字が不明瞭でどの建物のものであったかは不明{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}}。これに続き、中尊寺金堂の[[1124年]]（[[天治]]元年）のものも知られているが、書かれた年号だけ見れば同社のものの方が古いため、戦前には[[渡辺世祐]]による鑑定が行なわれたものの年代は断定されなかった。現在では、文面から同時代のものとは確定し難いとされており、後代に書き写されたものではないかとも考えられている。この棟札は[[1937年]]（[[昭和]]12年）に催された[[名古屋汎太平洋平和博覧会]]にも出品された。 [[1894年]]（明治27年）、一間社[[流造]]の本殿が建てられた。[[1935年]]（昭和10年）、神楽殿が建立。 [[2012年]]（[[平成]]24年）[[10月20日]]、新しい拝殿の竣工奉祝祭が行われた。 == 夏山八幡宮火祭り == {{main|夏山八幡宮火祭り}} == 脚注 == {{reflist}} {{脚注ヘルプ}} == 参考文献 == * 『額田町史』額田町史編集委員会、[[1986年]]11月1日 * 『愛知縣額田郡誌（復刻版）』千秋社、[[2003年]] * 『三河國額田郡誌（完）』愛知県額田郡役所、[[1924年]]（原本） == 関連項目 == {{Commonscat|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} * [[岡崎市]] * [[夏山町]] * [[額田町]] * [[豊富村 (愛知県額田郡)|豊富村]] * [[栄枝村]] {{神道 横}} {{デフォルトソート:なつやまはちまんくう}} [[Category:八幡宮]] [[Category:愛知県の旧郷社]] [[Category:岡崎市の神社]]

[[応神天皇]]、天津日子根命、[[天照大神]]、多紀理姫命、市寸嶋姫命、多紀津姫命、[[住吉三神|住吉大神]]{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = [[岡崎市役所]] |page = 40 }} |社格 = 郷社 |創建 = [[継体天皇]]25年（[[531年]]） |本殿 = 一間社流造{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = 岡崎市役所 |page = 206 }} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = [[夏山八幡宮火祭り]] }} [[File:Natsuyama-Hachimangu-5.jpg|thumb|250px|right|[[夏山八幡宮火祭り]]]] '''夏山八幡宮'''（なつやまはちまんぐう）は、[[愛知県]][[岡崎市]][[夏山町]]にある[[神社]]。[[10月]]に行われる[[夏山八幡宮火祭り|火祭り]]で知られる。 == 概要 == [[531年]]（[[継体天皇]]25年）に[[アマツヒコネ|天津日子根命]]を祀ったのが始まりとされる愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353。 [[880年]]（[[元慶]]4年）、[[応神天皇]]、[[イチキシマヒメ|市寸島比賣命]]、[[タギツヒメ|多岐都比賣神]]、[[住吉三神|住吉大神]]を合祀し、'''王宮八幡宮'''と称したが、のちに現在の名前に改められたという{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }}。 [[1872年]]（[[明治]]5年）[[10月3日 (旧暦)|10月3日]]、[[近代社格制度]]に基づき郷社に列した。[[額田郡]]の祖神を祀る神社とされる{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }}。 同社には880年（元慶4年）[[8月14日]]の日付がある[[棟札]]が現存しており建立時期を示す史料とされる額田町史、pp.188-189。現在、日本最古とされる棟札は[[中尊寺]]に伝わる[[1122年]]（[[保安 (元号)|保安]]3年）のものとされるが、文字が不明瞭でどの建物のものであったかは不明{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}}。これに続き、中尊寺金堂の[[1124年]]（[[天治]]元年）のものも知られているが、書かれた年号だけ見れば同社のものの方が古いため、戦前には[[渡辺世祐]]による鑑定が行なわれたものの年代は断定されなかった。現在では、文面から同時代のものとは確定し難いとされており、後代に書き写されたものではないかとも考えられている。この棟札は[[1937年]]（[[昭和]]12年）に催された[[名古屋汎太平洋平和博覧会]]にも出品された。 [[1894年]]（明治27年）、一間社[[流造]]の本殿が建てられた。[[1935年]]（昭和10年）、神楽殿が建立。 [[2012年]]（[[平成]]24年）[[10月20日]]、新しい拝殿の竣工奉祝祭が行われた。 == 夏山八幡宮火祭り == {{main|夏山八幡宮火祭り}} == 脚注 == {{reflist}} {{脚注ヘルプ}} == 参考文献 == * 『額田町史』額田町史編集委員会、[[1986年]]11月1日 * 『愛知縣額田郡誌（復刻版）』千秋社、[[2003年]] * 『三河國額田郡誌（完）』愛知県額田郡役所、[[1924年]]（原本） == 関連項目 == {{Commonscat|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} * [[岡崎市]] * [[夏山町]] * [[額田町]] * [[豊富村 (愛知県額田郡)|豊富村]] * [[栄枝村]] {{神道 横}} {{デフォルトソート:なつやまはちまんくう}} [[Category:八幡宮]] [[Category:愛知県の旧郷社]] [[Category:岡崎市の神社]]

{{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |名称 = 夏山八幡宮 |image = [[File:Natsuyama-Hachiman-gû Shintô Shrine - Shaden.jpg|270px]]
社殿 |location = {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}{{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}{{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}}字宮本 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|56|30.1|N|137|18|40.3|E|region:JP-23_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=夏山八幡宮}} |deity = {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone}}, {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神|1=Amaterasu|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami}}, {{ill|Tagiri-hime|ja|多紀理姫命}}, {{ill|Ichikishimahime|ja|市寸嶋姫命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多紀津姫命}}, {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = {{ill|Okazaki City Hall|ja|岡崎市役所}} |page = 40 }} |type = 郷社 |創建 = {{ill|531|ja|531st year}}（{{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}25th year ） |本殿 = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|一間社流造}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = 岡崎市役所 |page = 206 }} |別名 = |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}} }} [[File:Natsuyama-Hachimangu-5.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}]] '''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}}, {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り}}, held in {{ill|October|ja|10月}}. == Overview == The shrine was established in {{ill|531|ja|531st year}} (25th year of {{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇}}) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone}}.愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353 In {{ill|880|ja|880th year}} ({{ill|Gangyō|ja|元慶}} 4), {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}}, {{ill|Ichikishimahime|ja|市寸島比賣命}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }} On {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} of {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year}} ({{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|1=Meiji era}} 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社}} under the {{ill|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|ja|近代社格制度|1=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines}}. It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }} A {{ill|Mune-fuda|ja|棟札}} dated {{ill|August 14|ja|8月14日}}, 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.額田町史、pp.188-189 This plaque predates others such as the one from {{ill|1122|ja|1122nd year}} ({{ill|Hōan|ja|保安}} 3) at {{ill|Chūson-ji|ja|中尊寺}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}} However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity. The plaque was exhibited at the {{ill|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|ja|名古屋汎太平洋平和博覧会}} in {{ill|1937|ja|1937th year}} ({{ill|Shōwa|ja|昭和}} 12). In {{ill|1894|ja|1894th year}} (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in {{ill|1935|ja|1935th year}} (Shōwa 10). A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}}, {{ill|2012|ja|2012nd year}} (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == {{main|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival}} == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * 『額田町史』額田町史編集委員会、{{ill|1986|ja|1986th year}}11月1日 * 『愛知縣額田郡誌（復刻版）』千秋社、{{ill|2003|ja|2003rd year}} * 『三河國額田郡誌（完）』愛知県額田郡役所、{{ill|1924|ja|1924th year}}（原本） == See also == {{Commonscat|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} * {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}} * {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町}} * {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡}} * {{ill|Toyotomi Village|ja|豊富村 (愛知県額田郡)}} * {{ill|Sakaeji Village|ja|栄枝村}} {{神道 横}} }} {{draft categories| {{draft categories| [[Category:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Hachiman shrines]] [[Category:Former Gōsha shrines]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:New]] [[Category: [[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] }} [[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[sn:atsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[ja:夏山八幡宮]] [[en:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine}} {{translated page|ja|夏山八幡宮|version=97794083|comment=Imported full ja history}}

It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }} A {{ill|Mune-fuda|ja|棟札}} dated {{ill|August 14|ja|8月14日}}, 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.額田町史、pp.188-189 This plaque predates others such as the one from {{ill|1122|ja|1122nd year}} ({{ill|Hōan|ja|保安}} 3) at {{ill|Chūson-ji|ja|中尊寺}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}} However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity. 社殿 |location = {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県|12=draft}}{{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市|12=draft}}{{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|12=draft}}字宮本 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|56|30.1|N|137|18|40.3|E|region:JP-23_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=夏山八幡宮}} |deity = {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇|12=draft}}, {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone|12=draft}}, {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神|1=Amaterasu|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami|12=draft}}, {{ill|Tagiri-hime|ja|多紀理姫命|12=draft}}, {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸嶋姫命|12=draft}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多紀津姫命|12=draft}}, {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神|12=draft}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = {{ill|Okazaki City Hall|ja|岡崎市役所|12=draft}} |page = 40 }} |type = 郷社 |創建 = {{ill|531|ja|531st year|12=draft}}（{{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇|12=draft}}25th year ） |本殿 = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|一間社流造|12=draft}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = 岡崎市役所 |page = 206 }} |別名 = |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|12=draft}} }} [[File:Natsuyama-Hachimangu-5.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|12=draft}}]] '''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|12=draft}}, {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県|12=draft}}. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|12=draft}}, held in {{ill|October|ja|10月|12=draft}}. == Overview == The shrine was established in {{ill|531|ja|531st year|12=draft}} (25th year of {{ill|Emperor Keitai|ja|継体天皇|12=draft}}) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone|12=draft}}.愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353 In {{ill|880|ja|880th year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Gangyō|ja|元慶|12=draft}} 4), {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇|12=draft}}, {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸島比賣命|12=draft}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神|12=draft}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神|12=draft}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }} On {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日|12=draft}} of {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|1=Meiji era|12=draft}} 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|12=draft}} under the {{ill|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|ja|近代社格制度|1=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|12=draft}}. It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡|12=draft}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }} A {{ill|Mune-fuda|ja|棟札|12=draft}} dated {{ill|August 14|ja|8月14日|12=draft}}, 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.額田町史、pp.188-189 This plaque predates others such as the one from {{ill|1122|ja|1122nd year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Hōan|ja|保安|12=draft}} 3) at {{ill|Chūson-ji|ja|中尊寺|12=draft}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}} However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity. The plaque was exhibited at the {{ill|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|ja|名古屋汎太平洋平和博覧会|12=draft}} in {{ill|1937|ja|1937th year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Shōwa|ja|昭和|12=draft}} 12). In {{ill|1894|ja|1894th year|12=draft}} (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造|12=draft}} style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in {{ill|1935|ja|1935th year|12=draft}} (Shōwa 10). A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日|12=draft}}, {{ill|2012|ja|2012nd year|12=draft}} (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == {{main|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival}} == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * 『額田町史』額田町史編集委員会、{{ill|1986|ja|1986th year|12=draft}}11月1日 * 『愛知縣額田郡誌（復刻版）』千秋社、{{ill|2003|ja|2003rd year|12=draft}} * 『三河國額田郡誌（完）』愛知県額田郡役所、{{ill|1924|ja|1924th year|12=draft}}（原本） == See also == {{Commonscat|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} * {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市|12=draft}} * {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|12=draft}} * {{ill|Nukata District|ja|額田郡|12=draft}} * {{ill|Toyotomi Village|ja|豊富村 (愛知県額田郡)|12=draft}} * {{ill|Sakaeji Village|ja|栄枝村|12=draft}} {{神道 横}} }} {{draft categories| {{draft categories| }} {{translated page|ja|夏山八幡宮|version=97794083|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Hachiman shrines]] [[Category:Former Gōsha shrines]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category: [[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] }} [[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[sn:atsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[ja:夏山八幡宮]] [[en:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine}}

{{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|56|30.1|N|137|18|40.3|E|region:JP-23_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=夏山八幡宮}} |deity = [[:en:Emperor Ōjin|Emperor Ōjin]], {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|qq=}}, [[:en:Amaterasu|Amaterasu Ōmikami]], sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi Sanjin|qq=}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = {{ill|Okazaki City Hall|ja|岡崎市役所|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okazaki City Hall|qq=}} |page = 40 }} |type = 郷社 |創建 = [[:en:531|531]]（[[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]]25th year ） |本殿 = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|一間社流造|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagare-zukuri|qq=}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = 岡崎市役所
