Festival|qq=}} }} [[File:Natsuyama-Hachimangu-5.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|qq=}}]] '''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama|qq=}}, [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|qq=}}, held in [[:en:October|October]]. == Overview == The shrine was established in [[:en:531|531]] (25th year of [[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]]) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|qq=}}.愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353 In [[:en:880|880]] ([[:en:Gangyō|Gangyō]] 4), [[:en:Emperor Ōjin|Emperor Ōjin]], {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸島比賣命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|qq=}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsu-hime|qq=}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi Sanjin|qq=}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }} On [[:en:October 3|October 3]] of [[:en:1872|1872]] ([[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gōsha|qq=}} under the [[:en:Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines]]. It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of [[:en:Nukata District|Nukata District]].{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }} A {{ill|Munafuda|ja|棟札|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mune-fuda|qq=}} dated [[:en:August 14|August 14]], 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.額田町史、pp.188-189 This plaque predates others such as the one from [[:en:1122|1122]] ([[:en:Hōan|Hōan era]] 3) at [[:en:Chūson-ji|Chūson-ji]].{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}} However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity. The plaque was exhibited at the [[:en:Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition]] in [[:en:1937|1937]] ([[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] 12). In [[:en:1894|1894]] (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in [[:en:1935|1935]] (Shōwa 10). A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on [[:en:October 20|October 20]], [[:en:2012|2012]] (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == {{main|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival}} == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * 『額田町史』額田町史編集委員会、[[:en:1986|1986]]11月1日 * 『愛知縣額田郡誌（復刻版）』千秋社、[[:en:2003|2003]] * 『三河國額田郡誌（完）』愛知県額田郡役所、[[:en:1924|1924]]（原本） == See also == {{Commonscat|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} * [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki]] * {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama|qq=}} * [[:en:Nukata District|Nukata District]] * {{ill|Toyotomi Village|ja|豊富村 (愛知県額田郡)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Village|qq=}} * {{ill|Sakaeji Village|ja|栄枝村|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakaeji Village|qq=}} {{神道 横}} }} {{draft categories| {{draft categories| }} [[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[sn:atsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[ja:夏山八幡宮]] [[en:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[Category:Pages without translation templates]]

The plaque was exhibited at the [[:en:Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition]] in [[:en:1937|1937]] ([[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] 12). In [[:en:1894|1894]] (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in [[:en:1935|1935]] (Shōwa 10). A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on [[:en:October 20|October 20]], [[:en:2012|2012]] (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == {{main|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival}} == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * 『額田町史』額田町史編集委員会、[[:en:1986|1986]]11月1日 * 『愛知縣額田郡誌（復刻版）』千秋社、[[:en:2003|2003]] * 『三河國額田郡誌（完）』愛知県額田郡役所、[[:en:1924|1924]]（原本） == See also == {{Commonscat|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} * [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki]] * {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama|qq=}} * [[:en:Nukata District|Nukata District]] * {{ill|Toyotomi Village|ja|豊富村 (愛知県額田郡)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Village|qq=}} * {{ill|Sakaeji Village|ja|栄枝村|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakaeji Village|qq=}} {{神道 横}} }} {{draft categories| {{draft categories| }} [[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[sn:atsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[ja:夏山八幡宮]] [[en:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[Category:Pages without translation templates]] [[Category:Hachiman shrines]]

社殿 |location = [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]][[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki]]{{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama|qq=}}字宮本 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|56|30.1|N|137|18|40.3|E|region:JP-23_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=夏山八幡宮}} |deity = [[:en:Emperor Ōjin|Emperor Ōjin]], {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|qq=}}, [[:en:Amaterasu|Amaterasu Ōmikami]], {{ill|Tagorihime|lt=Tagorihime|lt=Tagiri-hime|ja|多紀理姫命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagiri-hime|qq=}}, {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸嶋姫命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|qq=}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多紀津姫命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsu-hime|qq=}}, {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi Sanjin|qq=}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = {{ill|Okazaki City Hall|ja|岡崎市役所|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okazaki City Hall|qq=}} |page = 40 }} |type = 郷社 |創建 = [[:en:531|531]]（[[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]]25th year ） |本殿 = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|一間社流造|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagare-zukuri|qq=}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = 岡崎市役所 |page = 206 }} |別名 = |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|qq=}} }} [[File:Natsuyama-Hachimangu-5.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|qq=}}]] '''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama|qq=}}, [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|qq=}}, held in [[:en:October|October]]. == Overview == The shrine was established in [[:en:531|531]] (25th year of [[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]]) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|qq=}}.愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353 In [[:en:880|880]] ([[:en:Gangyō|Gangyō]] 4), [[:en:Emperor Ōjin|Emperor Ōjin]], {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸島比賣命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|qq=}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsu-hime|qq=}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi Sanjin|qq=}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }} On [[:en:October 3|October 3]] of [[:en:1872|1872]] ([[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gōsha|qq=}} under the [[:en:Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines]]. It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of [[:en:Nukata District|Nukata District]].{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }} A {{ill|Munafuda|ja|棟札|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mune-fuda|qq=}} dated [[:en:August 14|August 14]], 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.額田町史、pp.188-189 This plaque predates others such as the one from [[:en:1122|1122]] ([[:en:Hōan|Hōan era]] 3) at [[:en:Chūson-ji|Chūson-ji]].{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}} However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity. The plaque was exhibited at the [[:en:Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition]] in [[:en:1937|1937]] ([[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] 12). In [[:en:1894|1894]] (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in [[:en:1935|1935]] (Shōwa 10). A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on [[:en:October 20|October 20]], [[:en:2012|2012]] (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == {{main|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival}} == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * 『額田町史』額田町史編集委員会、[[:en:1986|1986]]11月1日 * 『愛知縣額田郡誌（復刻版）』千秋社、[[:en:2003|2003]] * 『三河國額田郡誌（完）』愛知県額田郡役所、[[:en:1924|1924]]（原本） == See also == {{Commonscat|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} * [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki]] * {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama|qq=}} * [[:en:Nukata District|Nukata District]] * {{ill|Toyotomi Village|ja|豊富村 (愛知県額田郡)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Village|qq=}} * {{ill|Sakaeji Village|ja|栄枝村|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakaeji Village|qq=}} {{神道 横}} }} {{draft categories| {{draft categories| }} [[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[sn:atsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[ja:夏山八幡宮]] [[en:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[Category:Pages without translation templates]] [[Category:Hachiman shrines]] [[Category:岡崎市の神社]]

It was later renamed to its current name.{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }} On [[:en:October 3|October 3]] of [[:en:1872|1872]] ([[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gōsha|qq=}} under the [[:en:Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines]]. It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of [[:en:Nukata District|Nukata District]].{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }} A {{ill|Munafuda|ja|棟札|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mune-fuda|qq=}} dated [[:en:August 14|August 14]], 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.額田町史、pp.188-189 This plaque predates others such as the one from [[:en:1122|1122]] ([[:en:Hōan|Hōan era]] 3) at [[:en:Chūson-ji|Chūson-ji]].{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}} However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity. The plaque was exhibited at the [[:en:Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition]] in [[:en:1937|1937]] ([[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] 12). In [[:en:1894|1894]] (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in [[:en:1935|1935]] (Shōwa 10). A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on [[:en:October 20|October 20]], [[:en:2012|2012]] (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == {{main|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival}} == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * 『額田町史』額田町史編集委員会、[[:en:1986|1986]]11月1日 * 『愛知縣額田郡誌（復刻版）』千秋社、[[:en:2003|2003]] * 『三河國額田郡誌（完）』愛知県額田郡役所、[[:en:1924|1924]]（原本） == See also == {{Commonscat|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} * [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki]] * {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama|qq=}} * [[:en:Nukata District|Nukata District]] * {{ill|Toyotomi Village|ja|豊富村 (愛知県額田郡)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Village|qq=}} * {{ill|Sakaeji Village|ja|栄枝村|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakaeji Village|qq=}} {{神道 横}} }} {{draft categories| {{draft categories| }} [[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[sn:atsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[ja:夏山八幡宮]] [[en:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[Category:Pages without translation templates]] [[Category:Hachiman shrines]] [[Category:Shrines in Okazaki, Aichi]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Aichi Prefecture]]

|publisher = {{ill|Okazaki City Hall|ja|岡崎市役所|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okazaki City Hall|qq=}} |page = 40 }} |type = 郷社 |創建 = [[:en:531|531]]（[[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]]25th year ） |本殿 = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|一間社流造|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagare-zukuri|qq=}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = 岡崎市役所 |page = 206 }} |別名 = |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|qq=}} }} [[File:Natsuyama-Hachimangu-5.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|qq=}}]] '''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama|qq=}}, [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|qq=}}, held in [[:en:October|October]]. == Overview == The shrine was established in [[:en:531|531]] (25th year of [[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]]) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|qq=}}.愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353 In [[:en:880|880]] ([[:en:Gangyō|Gangyō]] 4), [[:en:Emperor Ōjin|Emperor Ōjin]], {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸島比賣命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|qq=}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsu-hime|qq=}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi Sanjin|qq=}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }} On [[:en:October 3|October 3]] of [[:en:1872|1872]] ([[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gōsha|qq=}} under the [[:en:Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines]]. It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of [[:en:Nukata District|Nukata District]].{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }} A {{ill|Munafuda|ja|棟札|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mune-fuda|qq=}} dated [[:en:August 14|August 14]], 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.額田町史、pp.188-189 This plaque predates others such as the one from [[:en:1122|1122]] ([[:en:Hōan|Hōan era]] 3) at [[:en:Chūson-ji|Chūson-ji]].{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}} However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity. The plaque was exhibited at the [[:en:Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition]] in [[:en:1937|1937]] ([[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] 12). In [[:en:1894|1894]] (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in [[:en:1935|1935]] (Shōwa 10). A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on [[:en:October 20|October 20]], [[:en:2012|2012]] (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == {{main|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival}} == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * 『額田町史』額田町史編集委員会、[[:en:1986|1986]]11月1日 * 『愛知縣額田郡誌（復刻版）』千秋社、[[:en:2003|2003]] * 『三河國額田郡誌（完）』愛知県額田郡役所、[[:en:1924|1924]]（原本） == See also == {{Commonscat|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} * [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki]] * {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama|qq=}} * [[:en:Nukata District|Nukata District]] * {{ill|Toyotomi Village|ja|豊富村 (愛知県額田郡)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Village|qq=}} * {{ill|Sakaeji Village|ja|栄枝村|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakaeji Village|qq=}} {{神道 横}} }} {{draft categories| {{draft categories| }} [[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[sn:atsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[ja:夏山八幡宮]] [[Category:Pages without translation templates]] [[Category:Hachiman shrines]] [[Category:Shrines in Okazaki, Aichi]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Aichi Prefecture]] {{Commons category|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} [[Category:pages without valid translation templates or en interwikis]]

A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on [[:en:October 20|October 20]], [[:en:2012|2012]] (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == {{main|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival}} == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * 『額田町史』額田町史編集委員会、[[:en:1986|1986]]11月1日 * 『愛知縣額田郡誌（復刻版）』千秋社、[[:en:2003|2003]] * 『三河國額田郡誌（完）』愛知県額田郡役所、[[:en:1924|1924]]（原本） == See also == {{Commonscat|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} * [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki]] * {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama|qq=}} * [[:en:Nukata District|Nukata District]] * {{ill|Toyotomi Village|ja|豊富村 (愛知県額田郡)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Village|qq=}} * {{ill|Sakaeji Village|ja|栄枝村|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakaeji Village|qq=}} {{神道 横}} }} {{draft categories| {{draft categories| }} [[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[sn:atsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[Category:Pages without valid translation templates or en interwikis but with jawiki links]][[ja:夏山八幡宮]] [[Category:Pages without translation templates]] [[Category:Hachiman shrines]] [[Category:Shrines in Okazaki, Aichi]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Aichi Prefecture]] {{Commons category|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} [[Category:pages without valid translation templates or en interwikis]]

{{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アマツヒコネ}}, [[:en:Amaterasu|Amaterasu Ōmikami]], {{ill|Tagorihime|lt=Tagorihime|lt=Tagiri-hime|ja|多紀理姫命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagiri-hime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タキリビメ}}, {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸嶋姫命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to イチキシマヒメ}}, |publisher = {{ill|Okazaki City Hall|ja|岡崎市役所|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okazaki City Hall|qq=}} |page = 40 }} |type = 郷社 |創建 = [[:en:531|531]]（[[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]]25th year ） |本殿 = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|一間社流造|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagare-zukuri|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 流造}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = 岡崎市役所 |page = 206 }} |別名 = |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|qq=}} }} [[File:Natsuyama-Hachimangu-5.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|qq=}}]] '''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama|qq=}}, [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|qq=}}, held in [[:en:October|October]]. == Overview == The shrine was established in [[:en:531|531]] (25th year of [[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]]) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アマツヒコネ}}.愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353 In [[:en:880|880]] ([[:en:Gangyō|Gangyō]] 4), [[:en:Emperor Ōjin|Emperor Ōjin]], {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸島比賣命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to イチキシマヒメ}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsu-hime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi Sanjin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }} On [[:en:October 3|October 3]] of [[:en:1872|1872]] ([[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gōsha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度}} under the [[:en:Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines]]. It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of [[:en:Nukata District|Nukata District]].{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }} A {{ill|Munafuda|ja|棟札|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mune-fuda|qq=}} dated [[:en:August 14|August 14]], 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.額田町史、pp.188-189 This plaque predates others such as the one from [[:en:1122|1122]] ([[:en:Hōan|Hōan era]] 3) at [[:en:Chūson-ji|Chūson-ji]].{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}} However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity. The plaque was exhibited at the [[:en:Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition]] in [[:en:1937|1937]] ([[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] 12). In [[:en:1894|1894]] (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in [[:en:1935|1935]] (Shōwa 10). A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on [[:en:October 20|October 20]], [[:en:2012|2012]] (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == {{main|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival}} == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * 『額田町史』額田町史編集委員会、[[:en:1986|1986]]11月1日 * 『愛知縣額田郡誌（復刻版）』千秋社、[[:en:2003|2003]] * 『三河國額田郡誌（完）』愛知県額田郡役所、[[:en:1924|1924]]（原本） == See also == {{Commonscat|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} * [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki]] * {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama|qq=}} * [[:en:Nukata District|Nukata District]] * {{ill|Toyotomi Village|ja|豊富村 (愛知県額田郡)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Village|qq=}} * {{ill|Sakaeji Village|ja|栄枝村|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakaeji Village|qq=}} {{神道 横}} }} {{draft categories| {{draft categories| }} [[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[sn:atsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[Category:Pages without valid translation templates or en interwikis but with jawiki links]][[ja:夏山八幡宮]] [[Category:Pages without translation templates]] [[Category:Hachiman shrines]] [[Category:Shrines in Okazaki, Aichi]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Aichi Prefecture]] {{Commons category|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} [[Category:pages without valid translation templates or en interwikis]] {{translated page|ja|夏山八幡宮|version=97794083|comment=Imported full ja history}}

Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|qq=}}]] '''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama|qq=}}, [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|qq=}}, held in [[:en:October|October]]. == Overview == The shrine was established in [[:en:531|531]] (25th year of [[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]]) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アマツヒコネ}}.愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353 In [[:en:880|880]] ([[:en:Gangyō|Gangyō]] 4), [[:en:Emperor Ōjin|Emperor Ōjin]], {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸島比賣命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to イチキシマヒメ}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsu-hime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi Sanjin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }} On [[:en:October 3|October 3]] of [[:en:1872|1872]] ([[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gōsha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度}} under the [[:en:Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines]]. It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of [[:en:Nukata District|Nukata District]].{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }} A {{ill|Munafuda|ja|棟札|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mune-fuda|qq=}} dated [[:en:August 14|August 14]], 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.額田町史、pp.188-189 This plaque predates others such as the one from [[:en:1122|1122]] ([[:en:Hōan|Hōan era]] 3) at [[:en:Chūson-ji|Chūson-ji]].{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}} However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity. The plaque was exhibited at the [[:en:Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition]] in [[:en:1937|1937]] ([[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] 12). In [[:en:1894|1894]] (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in [[:en:1935|1935]] (Shōwa 10). A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on [[:en:October 20|October 20]], [[:en:2012|2012]] (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == {{main|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival}} == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * 『額田町史』額田町史編集委員会、[[:en:1986|1986]]11月1日 * 『愛知縣額田郡誌（復刻版）』千秋社、[[:en:2003|2003]] * 『三河國額田郡誌（完）』愛知県額田郡役所、[[:en:1924|1924]]（原本） == See also == {{Commonscat|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} * [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki]] * {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama|qq=}} * [[:en:Nukata District|Nukata District]] * {{ill|Toyotomi Village|ja|豊富村 (愛知県額田郡)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Village|qq=}} * {{ill|Sakaeji Village|ja|栄枝村|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakaeji Village|qq=}} {{神道 横}} }} {{draft categories| {{draft categories| }} [[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[sn:atsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[Category:Pages without valid translation templates or en interwikis but with jawiki links]][[Category:Pages without valid translation templates or en interwikis but with jawiki links]][[ja:夏山八幡宮]] [[Category:Pages without translation templates]] [[Category:Hachiman shrines]] [[Category:Shrines in Okazaki, Aichi]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Aichi Prefecture]] {{Commons category|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} [[Category:pages without valid translation templates or en interwikis]] {{translated page|ja|夏山八幡宮|version=97794083|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[Category:Pages without valid translation templates or en interwikis or ja interwikis]]

The plaque was exhibited at the [[:en:Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition]] in [[:en:1937|1937]] ([[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] 12). In [[:en:1894|1894]] (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in [[:en:1935|1935]] (Shōwa 10). A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on [[:en:October 20|October 20]], [[:en:2012|2012]] (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == {{main|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival}} == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * 『額田町史』額田町史編集委員会、[[:en:1986|1986]]11月1日 * 『愛知縣額田郡誌（復刻版）』千秋社、[[:en:2003|2003]] * 『三河國額田郡誌（完）』愛知県額田郡役所、[[:en:1924|1924]]（原本） == See also == {{Commonscat|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} * [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki]] * {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama|qq=}} * [[:en:Nukata District|Nukata District]] * {{ill|Toyotomi Village|ja|豊富村 (愛知県額田郡)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Village|qq=}} * {{ill|Sakaeji Village|ja|栄枝村|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakaeji Village|qq=}} {{神道 横}} }} {{draft categories| {{draft categories| }} [[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[sn:atsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[ja:夏山八幡宮]] [[Category:Pages without translation templates]] [[Category:Hachiman shrines]] [[Category:Shrines in Okazaki, Aichi]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Aichi Prefecture]] {{Commons category|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} [[Category:Pages without valid translation templates or en interwikis]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:qq]] {{translated page|ja|夏山八幡宮|version=97794083|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[Category:Pages without valid translation templates or en interwikis or ja interwikis]]

{{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |名称 = 夏山八幡宮 |image = [[File:Natsuyama-Hachiman-gû Shintô Shrine - Shaden.jpg|270px]]
社殿 |location = [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]][[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki]]{{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama|qq=}}字宮本 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|56|30.1|N|137|18|40.3|E|region:JP-23_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=夏山八幡宮}} |deity = [[:en:Emperor Ōjin|Emperor Ōjin]], {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アマツヒコネ}}, [[:en:Amaterasu|Amaterasu Ōmikami]], {{ill|Tagorihime|lt=Tagorihime|lt=Tagiri-hime|ja|多紀理姫命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagiri-hime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タキリビメ}}, {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸嶋姫命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to イチキシマヒメ}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多紀津姫命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsu-hime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi Sanjin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = {{ill|Okazaki City Hall|ja|岡崎市役所|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okazaki City Hall|qq=}} |page = 40 }} |type = 郷社 |創建 = [[:en:531|531]]（[[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]]25th year ） |本殿 = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|一間社流造|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagare-zukuri|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 流造}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = 岡崎市役所 |page = 206 }} |別名 = |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|qq=}} }} [[File:Natsuyama-Hachimangu-5.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|qq=}}]] '''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama|qq=}}, [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|qq=}}, held in [[:en:October|October]]. == Overview == The shrine was established in [[:en:531|531]] (25th year of [[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]]) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アマツヒコネ}}.愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353 In [[:en:880|880]] ([[:en:Gangyō|Gangyō]] 4), [[:en:Emperor Ōjin|Emperor Ōjin]], {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸島比賣命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to イチキシマヒメ}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsu-hime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi Sanjin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }} On [[:en:October 3|October 3]] of [[:en:1872|1872]] ([[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gōsha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度}} under the [[:en:Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines]]. It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of [[:en:Nukata District|Nukata District]].{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }} A {{ill|Munafuda|ja|棟札|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mune-fuda|qq=}} dated [[:en:August 14|August 14]], 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.額田町史、pp.188-189 This plaque predates others such as the one from [[:en:1122|1122]] ([[:en:Hōan|Hōan era]] 3) at [[:en:Chūson-ji|Chūson-ji]].{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}} However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity. The plaque was exhibited at the [[:en:Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition]] in [[:en:1937|1937]] ([[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] 12). In [[:en:1894|1894]] (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in [[:en:1935|1935]] (Shōwa 10). A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on [[:en:October 20|October 20]], [[:en:2012|2012]] (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == {{main|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival}} == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * 『額田町史』額田町史編集委員会、[[:en:1986|1986]]11月1日 * 『愛知縣額田郡誌（復刻版）』千秋社、[[:en:2003|2003]] * 『三河國額田郡誌（完）』愛知県額田郡役所、[[:en:1924|1924]]（原本） == See also == {{Commonscat|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} * [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki]] * {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama|qq=}} * [[:en:Nukata District|Nukata District]] * {{ill|Toyotomi Village|ja|豊富村 (愛知県額田郡)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Village|qq=}} * {{ill|Sakaeji Village|ja|栄枝村|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakaeji Village|qq=}} {{神道 横}} }} {{draft categories| {{draft categories| }} [[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[sn:atsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[ja:夏山八幡宮]] [[Category:Pages without translation templates]] [[Category:Hachiman shrines]] [[Category:Shrines in Okazaki, Aichi]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Aichi Prefecture]] {{Commons category|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} [[Category:Pages without valid translation templates or en interwikis]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:pages with translation template added]]{{translated page|ja|夏山八幡宮|version=97794083|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[Category:Pages without valid translation templates or en interwikis or ja interwikis]]

The plaque was exhibited at the [[:en:Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition]] in [[:en:1937|1937]] ([[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] 12). Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|qq=}} }} [[File:Natsuyama-Hachimangu-5.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|qq=}}]] '''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama|qq=}}, [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|qq=}}, held in [[:en:October|October]]. == Overview == The shrine was established in [[:en:531|531]] (25th year of [[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]]) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アマツヒコネ}}.愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353 In [[:en:880|880]] ([[:en:Gangyō|Gangyō]] 4), [[:en:Emperor Ōjin|Emperor Ōjin]], {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸島比賣命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to イチキシマヒメ}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsu-hime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi Sanjin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }} On [[:en:October 3|October 3]] of [[:en:1872|1872]] ([[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gōsha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度}} under the [[:en:Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines]]. It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of [[:en:Nukata District|Nukata District]].{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }} A {{ill|Munafuda|ja|棟札|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mune-fuda|qq=}} dated [[:en:August 14|August 14]], 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.額田町史、pp.188-189 This plaque predates others such as the one from [[:en:1122|1122]] ([[:en:Hōan|Hōan era]] 3) at [[:en:Chūson-ji|Chūson-ji]].{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}} However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity. The plaque was exhibited at the [[:en:Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition]] in [[:en:1937|1937]] ([[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] 12). In [[:en:1894|1894]] (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in [[:en:1935|1935]] (Shōwa 10). A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on [[:en:October 20|October 20]], [[:en:2012|2012]] (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == {{main|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival}} == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * 『額田町史』額田町史編集委員会、[[:en:1986|1986]]11月1日 * 『愛知縣額田郡誌（復刻版）』千秋社、[[:en:2003|2003]] * 『三河國額田郡誌（完）』愛知県額田郡役所、[[:en:1924|1924]]（原本） == See also == {{Commonscat|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} * [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki]] * {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama|qq=}} * [[:en:Nukata District|Nukata District]] * {{ill|Toyotomi Village|ja|豊富村 (愛知県額田郡)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Village|qq=}} * {{ill|Sakaeji Village|ja|栄枝村|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakaeji Village|qq=}} {{神道 横}} }} {{draft categories| {{draft categories| }} [[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[sn:atsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[ja:夏山八幡宮]] [[Category:Pages without translation templates]] [[Category:Hachiman shrines]] [[Category:Shrines in Okazaki, Aichi]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Aichi Prefecture]] {{Commons category|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} [[Category:qq]][[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:pages with translation template added]]{{translated page|ja|夏山八幡宮|version=97794083|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[Category:Pages without valid translation templates or en interwikis or ja interwikis]] [[Category:岡崎市の神社]]

A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on [[:en:October 20|October 20]], [[:en:2012|2012]] (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == {{main|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival}} == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * 『額田町史』額田町史編集委員会、[[:en:1986|1986]]11月1日 * 『愛知縣額田郡誌（復刻版）』千秋社、[[:en:2003|2003]] * 『三河國額田郡誌（完）』愛知県額田郡役所、[[:en:1924|1924]]（原本） == See also == {{Commonscat|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} * [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki]] * {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama|qq=}} * [[:en:Nukata District|Nukata District]] * {{ill|Toyotomi Village|ja|豊富村 (愛知県額田郡)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Village|qq=}} * {{ill|Sakaeji Village|ja|栄枝村|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakaeji Village|qq=}} {{神道 横}} }} {{draft categories| {{draft categories| }} [[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[sn:atsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[ja:夏山八幡宮]] [[Category:Pages without translation templates]] [[Category:Hachiman shrines]] [[Category:Shrines in Okazaki, Aichi]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Aichi Prefecture]] {{Commons category|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} [[Category:qq]][[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:pages with translation template added]]{{translated page|ja|夏山八幡宮|version=97794083|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[Category:Pages without valid translation templates or en interwikis or ja interwikis]] [[Category:岡崎市の神社]] [[Category:Former_Gō-sha_in_Aichi_Prefecture]]

社殿 |location = [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]][[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki]]{{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama|qq=}}字宮本 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|56|30.1|N|137|18|40.3|E|region:JP-23_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=夏山八幡宮}} |deity = [[:en:Emperor Ōjin|Emperor Ōjin]], {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アマツヒコネ}}, [[:en:Amaterasu|Amaterasu Ōmikami]], {{ill|Tagorihime|lt=Tagorihime|lt=Tagiri-hime|ja|多紀理姫命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagiri-hime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タキリビメ}}, {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸嶋姫命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to イチキシマヒメ}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多紀津姫命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsu-hime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi Sanjin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = {{ill|Okazaki City Hall|ja|岡崎市役所|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okazaki City Hall|qq=}} |page = 40 }} |type = 郷社 |創建 = [[:en:531|531]]（[[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]]25th year ） |本殿 = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|一間社流造|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagare-zukuri|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 流造}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = 岡崎市役所 |page = 206 }} |別名 = |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|qq=}} }} [[File:Natsuyama-Hachimangu-5.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|qq=}}]] '''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama|qq=}}, [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|qq=}}, held in [[:en:October|October]]. == Overview == The shrine was established in [[:en:531|531]] (25th year of [[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]]) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アマツヒコネ}}.愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353 In [[:en:880|880]] ([[:en:Gangyō|Gangyō]] 4), [[:en:Emperor Ōjin|Emperor Ōjin]], {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸島比賣命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to イチキシマヒメ}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsu-hime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi Sanjin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }} On [[:en:October 3|October 3]] of [[:en:1872|1872]] ([[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|lt=Ken-sha|1=Modern_system_of_ranked_Shinto_shrines#District_shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gōsha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度}} under the [[:en:Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines]]. It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of [[:en:Nukata District|Nukata District]].{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }} A {{ill|Munafuda|ja|棟札|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mune-fuda|qq=}} dated [[:en:August 14|August 14]], 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.額田町史、pp.188-189 This plaque predates others such as the one from [[:en:1122|1122]] ([[:en:Hōan|Hōan era]] 3) at [[:en:Chūson-ji|Chūson-ji]].{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}} However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity. The plaque was exhibited at the [[:en:Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition]] in [[:en:1937|1937]] ([[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] 12). In [[:en:1894|1894]] (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in [[:en:1935|1935]] (Shōwa 10). A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on [[:en:October 20|October 20]], [[:en:2012|2012]] (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == {{main|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival}} == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * 『額田町史』額田町史編集委員会、[[:en:1986|1986]]11月1日 * 『愛知縣額田郡誌（復刻版）』千秋社、[[:en:2003|2003]] * 『三河國額田郡誌（完）』愛知県額田郡役所、[[:en:1924|1924]]（原本） == See also == {{Commonscat|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} * [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki]] * {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama|qq=}} * [[:en:Nukata District|Nukata District]] * {{ill|Toyotomi Village|ja|豊富村 (愛知県額田郡)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Village|qq=}} * {{ill|Sakaeji Village|ja|栄枝村|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakaeji Village|qq=}} {{神道 横}} }} {{draft categories| {{draft categories| }} [[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[sn:atsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[ja:夏山八幡宮]] [[Category:Pages without translation templates]] [[Category:Hachiman shrines]] [[Category:Shrines in Okazaki, Aichi]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Aichi Prefecture]] {{Commons category|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} [[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[Category:pages with translation template added]]{{translated page|ja|夏山八幡宮|version=97794083|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[Category:Pages without valid translation templates or en interwikis or ja interwikis]] [[Category:岡崎市の神社]] [[Category:Former_Gō-sha_in_Aichi_Prefecture]]

|publisher = {{ill|Okazaki City Hall|ja|岡崎市役所|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okazaki City Hall|qq=}} |page = 40 }} |type = 郷社 |創建 = [[:en:531|531]]（[[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]]25th year ） |本殿 = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|一間社流造|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagare-zukuri|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 流造}}{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = 岡崎市役所 |page = 206 }} |別名 = |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|qq=}} }} [[File:Natsuyama-Hachimangu-5.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|qq=}}]] '''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama|qq=}}, [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|qq=}}, held in [[:en:October|October]]. == Overview == The shrine was established in [[:en:531|531]] (25th year of [[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]]) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アマツヒコネ}}.愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353 In [[:en:880|880]] ([[:en:Gangyō|Gangyō]] 4), [[:en:Emperor Ōjin|Emperor Ōjin]], {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸島比賣命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to イチキシマヒメ|1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsu-hime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi Sanjin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }} On [[:en:October 3|October 3]] of [[:en:1872|1872]] ([[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|lt=Ken-sha|1=Modern_system_of_ranked_Shinto_shrines#District_shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gōsha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度}} under the [[:en:Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines]]. It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of [[:en:Nukata District|Nukata District]].{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }} A {{ill|Munafuda|ja|棟札|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mune-fuda|qq=}} dated [[:en:August 14|August 14]], 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.額田町史、pp.188-189 This plaque predates others such as the one from [[:en:1122|1122]] ([[:en:Hōan|Hōan era]] 3) at [[:en:Chūson-ji|Chūson-ji]].{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}} However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity. The plaque was exhibited at the [[:en:Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition]] in [[:en:1937|1937]] ([[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] 12). In [[:en:1894|1894]] (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in [[:en:1935|1935]] (Shōwa 10). A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on [[:en:October 20|October 20]], [[:en:2012|2012]] (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == {{main|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival}} == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * 『額田町史』額田町史編集委員会、[[:en:1986|1986]]11月1日 * 『愛知縣額田郡誌（復刻版）』千秋社、[[:en:2003|2003]] * 『三河國額田郡誌（完）』愛知県額田郡役所、[[:en:1924|1924]]（原本） == See also == {{Commonscat|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} * [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki]] * {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama|qq=}} * [[:en:Nukata District|Nukata District]] * {{ill|Toyotomi Village|ja|豊富村 (愛知県額田郡)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Village|qq=}} * {{ill|Sakaeji Village|ja|栄枝村|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakaeji Village|qq=}} {{神道 横}} }} {{draft categories| {{draft categories| }} [[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[sn:atsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[ja:夏山八幡宮]] [[Category:Pages without translation templates]] [[Category:Hachiman shrines]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Okazaki, Aichi]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Aichi Prefecture]] {{Commons category|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} [[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[Category:pages with translation template added]]{{translated page|ja|夏山八幡宮|version=97794083|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[Category:Pages without valid translation templates or en interwikis or ja interwikis]] [[Category:岡崎市の神社]] [[Category:Former_Gō-sha_in_Aichi_Prefecture]]

Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|qq=}}]] '''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama|qq=}}, [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|qq=}}, held in [[:en:October|October]]. == Overview == The shrine was established in [[:en:531|531]] (25th year of [[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]]) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アマツヒコネ}}.愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353 In [[:en:880|880]] ([[:en:Gangyō|Gangyō]] 4), [[:en:Emperor Ōjin|Emperor Ōjin]], {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸島比賣命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|qq=||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsu-hime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi Sanjin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }} On [[:en:October 3|October 3]] of [[:en:1872|1872]] ([[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|lt=Ken-sha|1=Modern_system_of_ranked_Shinto_shrines#District_shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gōsha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度}} under the [[:en:Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines]]. It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of [[:en:Nukata District|Nukata District]].{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }} A {{ill|Munafuda|ja|棟札|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mune-fuda|qq=}} dated [[:en:August 14|August 14]], 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.額田町史、pp.188-189 This plaque predates others such as the one from [[:en:1122|1122]] ([[:en:Hōan|Hōan era]] 3) at [[:en:Chūson-ji|Chūson-ji]].{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}} However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity. The plaque was exhibited at the [[:en:Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition]] in [[:en:1937|1937]] ([[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] 12). In [[:en:1894|1894]] (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in [[:en:1935|1935]] (Shōwa 10). A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on [[:en:October 20|October 20]], [[:en:2012|2012]] (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == {{main|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival}} == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * 『額田町史』額田町史編集委員会、[[:en:1986|1986]]11月1日 * 『愛知縣額田郡誌（復刻版）』千秋社、[[:en:2003|2003]] * 『三河國額田郡誌（完）』愛知県額田郡役所、[[:en:1924|1924]]（原本） == See also == {{Commonscat|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} * [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki]] * {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama|qq=}} * [[:en:Nukata District|Nukata District]] * {{ill|Toyotomi Village|ja|豊富村 (愛知県額田郡)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Village|qq=}} * {{ill|Sakaeji Village|ja|栄枝村|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakaeji Village|qq=}} {{神道 横}} }} {{draft categories| {{draft categories| }} [[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[sn:atsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[ja:夏山八幡宮]] [[Category:Pages without translation templates]] [[Category:Hachiman shrines]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Okazaki, Aichi]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Aichi Prefecture]] {{Commons category|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} [[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[Category:pages with translation template added]]{{translated page|ja|夏山八幡宮|version=97794083|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[Category:Pages without valid translation templates or en interwikis or ja interwikis]] [[Category:岡崎市の神社]] [[Category:Former_Gō-sha_in_Aichi_Prefecture]]

It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|qq=}}, held in [[:en:October|October]]. == Overview == The shrine was established in [[:en:531|531]] (25th year of [[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]]) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アマツヒコネ}}.愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353 In [[:en:880|880]] ([[:en:Gangyō|Gangyō]] 4), [[:en:Emperor Ōjin|Emperor Ōjin]], {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸島比賣命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|qq=||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsu-hime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi Sanjin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }} On [[:en:October 3|October 3]] of [[:en:1872|1872]] ([[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|lt=Ken-sha|1=Modern_system_of_ranked_Shinto_shrines#District_shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gōsha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度}} under the [[:en:Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines]]. It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of [[:en:Nukata District|Nukata District]].{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }} A {{ill|Munafuda|ja|棟札|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mune-fuda|qq=}} dated [[:en:August 14|August 14]], 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.額田町史、pp.188-189 This plaque predates others such as the one from [[:en:1122|1122]] ([[:en:Hōan|Hōan era]] 3) at [[:en:Chūson-ji|Chūson-ji]].{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}} However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity. The plaque was exhibited at the [[:en:Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition]] in [[:en:1937|1937]] ([[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] 12). In [[:en:1894|1894]] (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in [[:en:1935|1935]] (Shōwa 10). A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on [[:en:October 20|October 20]], [[:en:2012|2012]] (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == {{main|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival}} == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * 『額田町史』額田町史編集委員会、[[:en:1986|1986]]11月1日 * 『愛知縣額田郡誌（復刻版）』千秋社、[[:en:2003|2003]] * 『三河國額田郡誌（完）』愛知県額田郡役所、[[:en:1924|1924]]（原本） == See also == {{Commonscat|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} * [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki]] * {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama|qq=}} * [[:en:Nukata District|Nukata District]] * {{ill|Toyotomi Village|ja|豊富村 (愛知県額田郡)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Village|qq=}} * {{ill|Sakaeji Village|ja|栄枝村|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakaeji Village|qq=}} {{神道 横}} }} {{draft categories| {{draft categories| }} [[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[sn:atsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[ja:夏山八幡宮]] [[Category:Pages without translation templates]] [[Category:Hachiman shrines]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Okazaki, Aichi]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Aichi Prefecture]] {{Commons category|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} [[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[Category:pages with translation template added]]{{translated page|ja|夏山八幡宮|version=97794083|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[Category:Pages without valid translation templates or en interwikis or ja interwikis]] [[Category:Shrines in Okazaki, Aichi]] [[Category:Former_Gō-sha_in_Aichi_Prefecture]]

It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|qq=}}, held in [[:en:October|October]]. == Overview == The shrine was established in [[:en:531|531]] (25th year of [[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]]) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アマツヒコネ}}.愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353 In [[:en:880|880]] ([[:en:Gangyō|Gangyō]] 4), [[:en:Emperor Ōjin|Emperor Ōjin]], {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸島比賣命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|qq=||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsu-hime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi Sanjin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on [[:en:October 20|October 20]], [[:en:2012|2012]] (Heisei 24). == Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == {{main|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival}} == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * 『額田町史』額田町史編集委員会、[[:en:1986|1986]]11月1日 * 『愛知縣額田郡誌（復刻版）』千秋社、[[:en:2003|2003]] * 『三河國額田郡誌（完）』愛知県額田郡役所、[[:en:1924|1924]]（原本） == See also == {{Commonscat|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} * [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki]] * {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama|qq=}} * [[:en:Nukata District|Nukata District]] * {{ill|Toyotomi Village|ja|豊富村 (愛知県額田郡)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Village|qq=}} * {{ill|Sakaeji Village|ja|栄枝村|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakaeji Village|qq=}} {{神道 横}} }} {{draft categories| [[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[sn:atsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[ja:夏山八幡宮]] [[Category:Pages without translation templates]] [[Category:Hachiman shrines]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Okazaki, Aichi]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Aichi Prefecture]] {{Commons category|Natsuyama Hachimangu}} [[sn:Natsuyama Hachiman Shrine]] [[Category:pages with translation template added]]{{translated page|ja|夏山八幡宮|version=97794083|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[Category:Pages without valid translation templates or en interwikis or ja interwikis]] [[Category:Shrines in Okazaki, Aichi]] [[Category:Former_Gō-sha_in_Aichi_Prefecture]]

[[File:Natsuyama-Hachimangu-5.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|qq=}}]]
'''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama|qq=}}, [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|qq=}}, held in [[:en:October|October]].
== Overview == The shrine was established in [[:en:531|531]] (25th year of [[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]]) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アマツヒコネ}}.<ref name="gunshi">愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353</ref>
In [[:en:880|880]] ([[:en:Gangyō|Gangyō]] 4), [[:en:Emperor Ōjin|Emperor Ōjin]], {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸島比賣命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|qq=||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsu-hime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi Sanjin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.<ref name="gunshi"/><ref name="rekishiteki-219-232">{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }}</ref>
On [[:en:October 3|October 3]] of [[:en:1872|1872]] ([[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|lt=Ken-sha|1=Modern_system_of_ranked_Shinto_shrines#District_shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gōsha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度}} under the [[:en:Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines]].<ref name="gunshi"/> It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of [[:en:Nukata District|Nukata District]].<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }}</ref>
A {{ill|Munafuda|ja|棟札|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mune-fuda|qq=}} dated [[:en:August 14|August 14]], 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.<ref name="choushi">額田町史、pp.188-189</ref> This plaque predates others such as the one from [[:en:1122|1122]] ([[:en:Hōan|Hōan era]] 3) at [[:en:Chūson-ji|Chūson-ji]].<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}}</ref> However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity.<ref name="choushi"/> The plaque was exhibited at the [[:en:Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition]] in [[:en:1937|1937]] ([[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] 12).<ref name="choushi"/>
In [[:en:1894|1894]] (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in [[:en:1935|1935]] (Shōwa 10).<ref name="rekishiteki-219-232"/>
A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on [[:en:October 20|October 20]], [[:en:2012|2012]] (Heisei 24).

{{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アマツヒコネ}}, [[:en:Amaterasu|Amaterasu Ōmikami]], {{ill|Tagorihime|lt=Tagorihime|lt=Tagiri-hime|ja|多紀理姫命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagiri-hime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タキリビメ}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多紀津姫命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsu-hime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi Sanjin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}}<ref>{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = {{ill|Okazaki City Hall|ja|岡崎市役所|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okazaki City Hall|qq=|1=Okazaki City Hall|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11472848}} |page = 40 }}</ref> to 流造}}<ref>{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = 岡崎市役所 |page = 206 }}</ref> |別名 = |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|qq=|1=Natsuyama Fire Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30925230}} |prefecture = {{ill|Okazaki|qid=Q242783}} |coordinates = {{Coord|34.941694|N|137.311194|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} }}
[[File:Natsuyama-Hachimangu-5.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|qq=|1=Natsuyama Fire Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30925230}}]]
'''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama|qq=|1=Natsuyama-chō, Okazaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11429972}}, [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|qq=|1=Natsuyama Fire Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30925230}}, held in [[:en:October|October]].
== Overview == The shrine was established in [[:en:531|531]] (25th year of [[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]]) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アマツヒコネ}}.<ref name="gunshi">愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353</ref>
In [[:en:880|880]] ([[:en:Gangyō|Gangyō]] 4), [[:en:Emperor Ōjin|Emperor Ōjin]], {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸島比賣命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|qq=||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsu-hime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi Sanjin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.<ref name="gunshi"/><ref name="rekishiteki-219-232">{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }}</ref>
On [[:en:October 3|October 3]] of [[:en:1872|1872]] ([[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|1=Gō-sha|qid=Q134917316}}{{efn|District Shrines|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gōsha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} under the [[:en:Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines]].<ref name="gunshi"/> It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of [[:en:Nukata District|Nukata District]].<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }}</ref>
A {{ill|Munafuda|ja|棟札|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mune-fuda|qq=}} dated [[:en:August 14|August 14]], 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.<ref name="choushi">額田町史、pp.188-189</ref> This plaque predates others such as the one from [[:en:1122|1122]] ([[:en:Hōan|Hōan era]] 3) at [[:en:Chūson-ji|Chūson-ji]].<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}}</ref> However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity.<ref name="choushi"/> The plaque was exhibited at the [[:en:Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition]] in [[:en:1937|1937]] ([[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] 12).<ref name="choushi"/>
In [[:en:1894|1894]] (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in [[:en:1935|1935]] (Shōwa 10).<ref name="rekishiteki-219-232"/>
A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on [[:en:October 20|October 20]], [[:en:2012|2012]] (Heisei 24).
== Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == {{main|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival}}
