'''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama|qq=|1=Natsuyama-chō, Okazaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11429972}}, [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|qq=|1=Natsuyama Fire Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30925230}}, held in [[:en:October|October]].
== Overview == The shrine was established in [[:en:531|531]] (25th year of [[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]]) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アマツヒコネ}}.<ref name="gunshi">愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353</ref>
In [[:en:880|880]] ([[:en:Gangyō|Gangyō]] 4), [[:en:Emperor Ōjin|Emperor Ōjin]], {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸島比賣命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|qq=||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsu-hime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi Sanjin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.<ref name="gunshi"/><ref name="rekishiteki-219-232">{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }}</ref>
On [[:en:October 3|October 3]] of [[:en:1872|1872]] ([[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|1=Gō-sha|qid=Q134917316}}{{efn|District Shrines|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gōsha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} under the [[:en:Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines]].<ref name="gunshi"/> It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of [[:en:Nukata District|Nukata District]].<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }}</ref>
A {{ill|Munafuda|ja|棟札|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mune-fuda|qq=}} dated [[:en:August 14|August 14]], 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.<ref name="choushi">額田町史、pp.188-189</ref> This plaque predates others such as the one from [[:en:1122|1122]] ([[:en:Hōan|Hōan era]] 3) at [[:en:Chūson-ji|Chūson-ji]].<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}}</ref> However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity.<ref name="choushi"/> The plaque was exhibited at the [[:en:Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition]] in [[:en:1937|1937]] ([[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] 12).<ref name="choushi"/>
In [[:en:1894|1894]] (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in [[:en:1935|1935]] (Shōwa 10).<ref name="rekishiteki-219-232"/>
A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on [[:en:October 20|October 20]], [[:en:2012|2012]] (Heisei 24).

[[File:Natsuyama-Hachimangu-5.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|qq=|1=Natsuyama Fire Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30925230}}]]
'''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama|qq=|1=Natsuyama-chō, Okazaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11429972}}, [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|qq=|1=Natsuyama Fire Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30925230}}, held in [[:en:October|October]].
== Overview == The shrine was established in [[:en:531|531]] (25th year of [[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]]) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アマツヒコネ}}.<ref name="gunshi">愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353</ref>
In [[:en:880|880]] ([[:en:Gangyō|Gangyō]] 4), [[:en:Emperor Ōjin|Emperor Ōjin]], {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸島比賣命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|qq=||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsu-hime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi Sanjin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.<ref name="gunshi"/><ref name="rekishiteki-219-232">{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }}</ref>
On [[:en:October 3|October 3]] of [[:en:1872|1872]] ([[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|1=Gō-sha|qid=Q134917316}}{{efn|District Shrines|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gōsha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} under the [[:en:Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines]].<ref name="gunshi"/> It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of [[:en:Nukata District|Nukata District]].<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }}</ref>
A {{ill|Munafuda|ja|棟札|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mune-fuda|qq=}} dated [[:en:August 14|August 14]], 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.<ref name="choushi">額田町史、pp.188-189</ref> This plaque predates others such as the one from [[:en:1122|1122]] ([[:en:Hōan|Hōan era]] 3) at [[:en:Chūson-ji|Chūson-ji]].<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}}</ref> However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity.<ref name="choushi"/> The plaque was exhibited at the [[:en:Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition]] in [[:en:1937|1937]] ([[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] 12).<ref name="choushi"/>
In [[:en:1894|1894]] (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in [[:en:1935|1935]] (Shōwa 10).<ref name="rekishiteki-219-232"/>
A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on [[:en:October 20|October 20]], [[:en:2012|2012]] (Heisei 24).

'''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama|qq=|1=Natsuyama-chō, Okazaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11429972}}, [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|qq=|1=Natsuyama Fire Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30925230}}, held in [[:en:October|October]].
== Overview == The shrine was established in [[:en:531|531]] (25th year of [[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]]) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アマツヒコネ}}.<ref name="gunshi">愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353</ref>
In [[:en:880|880]] ([[:en:Gangyō|Gangyō]] 4), [[:en:Emperor Ōjin|Emperor Ōjin]], {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸島比賣命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|qq=||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsu-hime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi Sanjin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.<ref name="gunshi"/><ref name="rekishiteki-219-232">{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }}</ref>
On [[:en:October 3|October 3]] of [[:en:1872|1872]] ([[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|1=Gō-sha|WD=Q134917316}}{{efn|District Shrines|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gōsha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} under the [[:en:Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines]].<ref name="gunshi"/> It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of [[:en:Nukata District|Nukata District]].<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }}</ref>
A {{ill|Munafuda|ja|棟札|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mune-fuda|qq=}} dated [[:en:August 14|August 14]], 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.<ref name="choushi">額田町史、pp.188-189</ref> This plaque predates others such as the one from [[:en:1122|1122]] ([[:en:Hōan|Hōan era]] 3) at [[:en:Chūson-ji|Chūson-ji]].<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}}</ref> However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity.<ref name="choushi"/> The plaque was exhibited at the [[:en:Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition]] in [[:en:1937|1937]] ([[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] 12).<ref name="choushi"/>
In [[:en:1894|1894]] (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in [[:en:1935|1935]] (Shōwa 10).<ref name="rekishiteki-219-232"/>
A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on [[:en:October 20|October 20]], [[:en:2012|2012]] (Heisei 24).

[[File:Natsuyama-Hachimangu-5.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|qq=|1=Natsuyama Fire Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30925230}}]]
'''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama|qq=|1=Natsuyama-chō, Okazaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11429972}}, [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|qq=|1=Natsuyama Fire Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30925230}}, held in [[:en:October|October]].
== Overview == The shrine was established in [[:en:531|531]] (25th year of [[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]]) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アマツヒコネ}}.<ref name="gunshi">愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353</ref>
In [[:en:880|880]] ([[:en:Gangyō|Gangyō]] 4), [[:en:Emperor Ōjin|Emperor Ōjin]], {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸島比賣命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|qq=||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsu-hime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi Sanjin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.<ref name="gunshi"/><ref name="rekishiteki-219-232">{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }}</ref>
On [[:en:October 3|October 3]] of [[:en:1872|1872]] ([[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|1=Gō-sha|WD=Q134917316}}{{efn|District Shrines|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gōsha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} under the [[:en:Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines]].<ref name="gunshi"/> It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of [[:en:Nukata District|Nukata District]].<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }}</ref>
A {{ill|Munafuda|ja|棟札|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mune-fuda|qq=}} dated [[:en:August 14|August 14]], 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.<ref name="choushi">額田町史、pp.188-189</ref> This plaque predates others such as the one from [[:en:1122|1122]] ([[:en:Hōan|Hōan era]] 3) at [[:en:Chūson-ji|Chūson-ji]].<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}}</ref> However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity.<ref name="choushi"/> The plaque was exhibited at the [[:en:Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition]] in [[:en:1937|1937]] ([[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] 12).<ref name="choushi"/>
In [[:en:1894|1894]] (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in [[:en:1935|1935]] (Shōwa 10).<ref name="rekishiteki-219-232"/>
A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on [[:en:October 20|October 20]], [[:en:2012|2012]] (Heisei 24).

'''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama|qq=|1=Natsuyama-chō, Okazaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11429972}}, [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|qq=|1=Natsuyama Fire Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30925230}}, held in [[:en:October|October]].
== Overview == The shrine was established in [[:en:531|531]] (25th year of [[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]]) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アマツヒコネ}}.<ref name="gunshi">愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353</ref>
In [[:en:880|880]] ([[:en:Gangyō|Gangyō]] 4), [[:en:Emperor Ōjin|Emperor Ōjin]], {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸島比賣命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|qq=||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsu-hime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi Sanjin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.<ref name="gunshi"/><ref name="rekishiteki-219-232">{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }}</ref>
On [[:en:October 3|October 3]] of [[:en:1872|1872]] ([[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|1=Gō-sha|WD=Q134917316}}{{efn|District Shrines|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gōsha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} under the [[:en:Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines]].<ref name="gunshi"/> It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of [[:en:Nukata District|Nukata District]].<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }}</ref>
A {{ill|Munafuda|ja|棟札|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mune-fuda|qq=}} dated [[:en:August 14|August 14]], 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.<ref name="choushi">額田町史、pp.188-189</ref> This plaque predates others such as the one from [[:en:1122|1122]] ([[:en:Hōan|Hōan era]] 3) at [[:en:Chūson-ji|Chūson-ji]].<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}}</ref> However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity.<ref name="choushi"/> The plaque was exhibited at the [[:en:Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition]] in [[:en:1937|1937]] ([[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] 12).<ref name="choushi"/>
In [[:en:1894|1894]] (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in [[:en:1935|1935]] (Shōwa 10).<ref name="rekishiteki-219-232"/>
A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on [[:en:October 20|October 20]], [[:en:2012|2012]] (Heisei 24).

[[File:Natsuyama-Hachimangu-5.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|1=Natsuyama Fire Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30925230}}]]
'''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama|1=Natsuyama-chō, Okazaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11429972}}, [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|1=Natsuyama Fire Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30925230}}, held in [[:en:October|October]].
== Overview == The shrine was established in [[:en:531|531]] (25th year of [[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]]) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アマツヒコネ}}.<ref name="gunshi">愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353</ref>
In [[:en:880|880]] ([[:en:Gangyō|Gangyō]] 4), [[:en:Emperor Ōjin|Emperor Ōjin]], {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸島比賣命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsu-hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.<ref name="gunshi"/><ref name="rekishiteki-219-232">{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }}</ref>
On [[:en:October 3|October 3]] of [[:en:1872|1872]] ([[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|1=Gō-sha|WD=Q134917316}}{{efn|District Shrines|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gōsha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} under the [[:en:Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines]].<ref name="gunshi"/> It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of [[:en:Nukata District|Nukata District]].<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }}</ref>
A {{ill|Munafuda|ja|棟札|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mune-fuda|qq=}} dated [[:en:August 14|August 14]], 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.<ref name="choushi">額田町史、pp.188-189</ref> This plaque predates others such as the one from [[:en:1122|1122]] ([[:en:Hōan|Hōan era]] 3) at [[:en:Chūson-ji|Chūson-ji]].<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}}</ref> However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity.<ref name="choushi"/> The plaque was exhibited at the [[:en:Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition]] in [[:en:1937|1937]] ([[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] 12).<ref name="choushi"/>
In [[:en:1894|1894]] (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in [[:en:1935|1935]] (Shōwa 10).<ref name="rekishiteki-219-232"/>
A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on [[:en:October 20|October 20]], [[:en:2012|2012]] (Heisei 24).

== Overview == The shrine was established in [[:en:531|531]] (25th year of [[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]]) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アマツヒコネ}}.<ref name="gunshi">愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353</ref>

It was later renamed to its current name.<ref name="gunshi"/><ref name="rekishiteki-219-232">{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }}</ref>

In [[:en:1894|1894]] (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in [[:en:1935|1935]] (Shōwa 10).<ref name="rekishiteki-219-232"/>

[[File:Natsuyama-Hachimangu-5.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|1=Natsuyama Fire Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30925230}}]]
'''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama|1=Natsuyama-chō, Okazaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11429972}}, [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|1=Natsuyama Fire Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30925230}}, held in [[:en:October|October]].
== Overview == The shrine was established in [[:en:531|531]] (25th year of [[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]]) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アマツヒコネ}}.<ref name="gunshi">愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353</ref>
In [[:en:880|880]] ([[:en:Gangyō|Gangyō]] 4), [[:en:Emperor Ōjin|Emperor Ōjin]], {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸島比賣命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsu-hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.<ref name="gunshi"/><ref name="rekishiteki-219-232">{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }}</ref>
On [[:en:October 3|October 3]] of [[:en:1872|1872]] ([[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|1=Gō-sha|WD=Q134917316}}{{efn|District Shrines|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gōsha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} under the [[:en:Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines]].<ref name="gunshi"/> It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of [[:en:Nukata District|Nukata District]].<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }}</ref>
A {{ill|Munafuda|ja|棟札|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mune-fuda|qq=}} dated [[:en:August 14|August 14]], 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.<ref name="choushi">額田町史、pp.188-189</ref> This plaque predates others such as the one from [[:en:1122|1122]] ([[:en:Hōan|Hōan era]] 3) at [[:en:Chūson-ji|Chūson-ji]].<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}}</ref> However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity.<ref name="choushi"/> The plaque was exhibited at the [[:en:Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition]] in [[:en:1937|1937]] ([[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] 12).<ref name="choushi"/>
In [[:en:1894|1894]] (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in [[:en:1935|1935]] (Shōwa 10).<ref name="rekishiteki-219-232"/>
A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on [[:en:October 20|October 20]], [[:en:2012|2012]] (Heisei 24).

'''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama|1=Natsuyama-chō, Okazaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11429972}}, [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|1=Natsuyama Fire Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30925230}}, held in [[:en:October|October]].
== Overview == The shrine was established in [[:en:531|531]] (25th year of [[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]]) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アマツヒコネ}}.<ref name="gunshi">愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353</ref>
In [[:en:880|880]] ([[:en:Gangyō|Gangyō]] 4), [[:en:Emperor Ōjin|Emperor Ōjin]], {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸島比賣命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsu-hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.<ref name="gunshi"/><ref name="rekishiteki-219-232">{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }}</ref>
On [[:en:October 3|October 3]] of [[:en:1872|1872]] ([[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|1=Gō-sha|WD=Q134917316}}{{efn|District Shrines|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gōsha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} under the [[:en:Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines]].<ref name="gunshi"/> It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of [[:en:Nukata District|Nukata District]].<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }}</ref>
A {{ill|Munafuda|ja|棟札|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mune-fuda|qq=}} dated [[:en:August 14|August 14]], 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.<ref name="choushi">額田町史、pp.188-189</ref> This plaque predates others such as the one from [[:en:1122|1122]] ([[:en:Hōan|Hōan era]] 3) at [[:en:Chūson-ji|Chūson-ji]].<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}}</ref> However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity.<ref name="choushi"/> The plaque was exhibited at the [[:en:Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition]] in [[:en:1937|1937]] ([[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] 12).<ref name="choushi"/>
In [[:en:1894|1894]] (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in [[:en:1935|1935]] (Shōwa 10).<ref name="rekishiteki-219-232"/>
A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on [[:en:October 20|October 20]], [[:en:2012|2012]] (Heisei 24).

[[File:Natsuyama-Hachimangu-5.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|1=Natsuyama Fire Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30925230}}]]
'''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama|1=Natsuyama-chō, Okazaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11429972}}, [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|1=Natsuyama Fire Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30925230}}, held in [[:en:October|October]].
== Overview == The shrine was established in [[:en:531|531]] (25th year of [[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]]) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アマツヒコネ}}.<ref name="gunshi">愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353</ref>
In [[:en:880|880]] ([[:en:Gangyō|Gangyō]] 4), [[:en:Emperor Ōjin|Emperor Ōjin]], {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸島比賣命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsu-hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.<ref name="gunshi"/><ref name="rekishiteki-219-232">{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }}</ref>
On [[:en:October 3|October 3]] of [[:en:1872|1872]] ([[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|1=Gō-sha|WD=Q134917316}}{{efn|District Shrines|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gōsha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} under the [[:en:Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines]].<ref name="gunshi"/> It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of [[:en:Nukata District|Nukata District]].<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }}</ref>
A {{ill|Munafuda|ja|棟札|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mune-fuda|qq=}} dated [[:en:August 14|August 14]], 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.<ref name="choushi">額田町史、pp.188-189</ref> This plaque predates others such as the one from [[:en:1122|1122]] ([[:en:Hōan|Hōan era]] 3) at [[:en:Chūson-ji|Chūson-ji]].<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}}</ref> However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity.<ref name="choushi"/> The plaque was exhibited at the [[:en:Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition]] in [[:en:1937|1937]] ([[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] 12).<ref name="choushi"/>
In [[:en:1894|1894]] (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in [[:en:1935|1935]] (Shōwa 10).<ref name="rekishiteki-219-232"/>
A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on [[:en:October 20|October 20]], [[:en:2012|2012]] (Heisei 24).

Sanjin|ja|住吉大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}}<ref>{{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = {{ill|Okazaki City Hall|ja|岡崎市役所|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okazaki City Hall|1=Okazaki City Hall|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11472848}} |page = 40 }}</ref> |type = 郷社 |創建 = [[:en:531|531]]（[[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]]25th year ） |本殿 = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|一間社流造|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagare-zukuri|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 流造}}<ref>{{Cite book|和書 Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|1=Natsuyama Fire Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30925230}} |prefecture = {{ill|Okazaki|WD=Q242783}} |coordinates = {{Coord|34.941694|N|137.311194|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} }}
[[File:Natsuyama-Hachimangu-5.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|1=Natsuyama Fire Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30925230}}]]
'''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama|1=Natsuyama-chō, Okazaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11429972}}, [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|1=Natsuyama Fire Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30925230}}, held in [[:en:October|October]].
== Overview == The shrine was established in [[:en:531|531]] (25th year of [[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]]) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アマツヒコネ}}.<ref name="gunshi">愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353</ref>
In [[:en:880|880]] ([[:en:Gangyō|Gangyō]] 4), [[:en:Emperor Ōjin|Emperor Ōjin]], {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸島比賣命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsu-hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.<ref name="gunshi"/><ref name="rekishiteki-219-232">{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }}</ref>
On [[:en:October 3|October 3]] of [[:en:1872|1872]] ([[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|1=Gō-sha|WD=Q134917316}}{{efn|District Shrines|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gōsha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} under the [[:en:Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines]].<ref name="gunshi"/> It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of [[:en:Nukata District|Nukata District]].<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }}</ref>
A {{ill|Munafuda|ja|棟札|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mune-fuda|qq=}} dated [[:en:August 14|August 14]], 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.<ref name="choushi">額田町史、pp.188-189</ref> This plaque predates others such as the one from [[:en:1122|1122]] ([[:en:Hōan|Hōan era]] 3) at [[:en:Chūson-ji|Chūson-ji]].<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}}</ref> However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity.<ref name="choushi"/> The plaque was exhibited at the [[:en:Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition]] in [[:en:1937|1937]] ([[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] 12).<ref name="choushi"/>
In [[:en:1894|1894]] (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in [[:en:1935|1935]] (Shōwa 10).<ref name="rekishiteki-219-232"/>
A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on [[:en:October 20|October 20]], [[:en:2012|2012]] (Heisei 24).

'''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama|1=Natsuyama-chō, Okazaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11429972}}, [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|1=Natsuyama Fire Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30925230}}, held in [[:en:October|October]].
== Overview == The shrine was established in [[:en:531|531]] (25th year of [[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]]) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アマツヒコネ}}.<ref name="gunshi">愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353</ref>
In [[:en:880|880]] ([[:en:Gangyō|Gangyō]] 4), [[:en:Emperor Ōjin|Emperor Ōjin]], {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸島比賣命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsu-hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.<ref name="gunshi"/><ref name="rekishiteki-219-232">{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }}</ref>
On [[:en:October 3|October 3]] of [[:en:1872|1872]] ([[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|1=Gō-sha|WD=Q134917316}}{{efn|District Shrines|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gōsha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} under the [[:en:Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines]].<ref name="gunshi"/> It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of [[:en:Nukata District|Nukata District]].<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }}</ref>
A {{ill|Munafuda|ja|棟札|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mune-fuda|qq=}} dated [[:en:August 14|August 14]], 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.<ref name="choushi">額田町史、pp.188-189</ref> This plaque predates others such as the one from [[:en:1122|1122]] ([[:en:Hōan|Hōan era]] 3) at [[:en:Chūson-ji|Chūson-ji]].<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}}</ref> However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity.<ref name="choushi"/> The plaque was exhibited at the [[:en:Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition]] in [[:en:1937|1937]] ([[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] 12).<ref name="choushi"/>
In [[:en:1894|1894]] (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in [[:en:1935|1935]] (Shōwa 10).<ref name="rekishiteki-219-232"/>
A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on [[:en:October 20|October 20]], [[:en:2012|2012]] (Heisei 24).

[[File:Natsuyama-Hachimangu-5.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|1=Natsuyama Fire Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30925230}}]]
'''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama|1=Natsuyama-chō, Okazaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11429972}}, [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|1=Natsuyama Fire Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30925230}}, held in [[:en:October|October]].
== Overview == The shrine was established in [[:en:531|531]] (25th year of [[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]]) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アマツヒコネ}}.<ref name="gunshi">愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353</ref>
In [[:en:880|880]] ([[:en:Gangyō|Gangyō]] 4), [[:en:Emperor Ōjin|Emperor Ōjin]], {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸島比賣命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsu-hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.<ref name="gunshi"/><ref name="rekishiteki-219-232">{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }}</ref>
On [[:en:October 3|October 3]] of [[:en:1872|1872]] ([[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|1=Gō-sha|WD=Q134917316}}{{efn|District Shrines|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gōsha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} under the [[:en:Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines]].<ref name="gunshi"/> It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of [[:en:Nukata District|Nukata District]].<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }}</ref>
A {{ill|Munafuda|ja|棟札|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mune-fuda|qq=}} dated [[:en:August 14|August 14]], 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.<ref name="choushi">額田町史、pp.188-189</ref> This plaque predates others such as the one from [[:en:1122|1122]] ([[:en:Hōan|Hōan era]] 3) at [[:en:Chūson-ji|Chūson-ji]].<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}}</ref> However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity.<ref name="choushi"/> The plaque was exhibited at the [[:en:Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition]] in [[:en:1937|1937]] ([[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] 12).<ref name="choushi"/>
In [[:en:1894|1894]] (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in [[:en:1935|1935]] (Shōwa 10).<ref name="rekishiteki-219-232"/>
A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on [[:en:October 20|October 20]], [[:en:2012|2012]] (Heisei 24).

'''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama|1=Natsuyama-chō, Okazaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11429972}}, [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|1=Natsuyama Fire Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30925230}}, held in [[:en:October|October]].
== Overview == The shrine was established in [[:en:531|531]] (25th year of [[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]]) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アマツヒコネ}}.<ref name="gunshi">愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353</ref>
In [[:en:880|880]] ([[:en:Gangyō|Gangyō]] 4), [[:en:Emperor Ōjin|Emperor Ōjin]], {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸島比賣命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsu-hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.<ref name="gunshi"/><ref name="rekishiteki-219-232">{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }}</ref>
On [[:en:October 3|October 3]] of [[:en:1872|1872]] ([[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|1=Gō-sha|WD=Q134917316}}{{efn|District Shrines|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gōsha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} under the [[:en:Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines]].<ref name="gunshi"/> It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of [[:en:Nukata District|Nukata District]].<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }}</ref>
A {{ill|Munafuda|ja|棟札|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mune-fuda|qq=}} dated [[:en:August 14|August 14]], 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.<ref name="choushi">額田町史、pp.188-189</ref> This plaque predates others such as the one from [[:en:1122|1122]] ([[:en:Hōan|Hōan era]] 3) at [[:en:Chūson-ji|Chūson-ji]].<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}}</ref> However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity.<ref name="choushi"/> The plaque was exhibited at the [[:en:Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition]] in [[:en:1937|1937]] ([[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] 12).<ref name="choushi"/>
In [[:en:1894|1894]] (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in [[:en:1935|1935]] (Shōwa 10).<ref name="rekishiteki-219-232"/>
A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on [[:en:October 20|October 20]], [[:en:2012|2012]] (Heisei 24).

|author = |year = 2010-3-31 |title = 新編 岡崎市史 額田資料編 Ⅰ 文化財・考古・中世城館 |publisher = 岡崎市役所 |page = 206 }}</ref> |別名 = |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|1=Natsuyama Fire Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30925230}} |prefecture = {{ill|Okazaki|WD=Q242783}} |coordinates = {{Coord|34.941694|N|137.311194|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} }}
[[File:Natsuyama-Hachimangu-5.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|1=Natsuyama Fire Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30925230}}]]
'''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama|1=Natsuyama-chō, Okazaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11429972}}, [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|1=Natsuyama Fire Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30925230}}, held in [[:en:October|October]].
== Overview == The shrine was established in [[:en:531|531]] (25th year of [[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]]) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アマツヒコネ}}.<ref name="gunshi">愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353</ref>
In [[:en:880|880]] ([[:en:Gangyō|Gangyō]] 4), [[:en:Emperor Ōjin|Emperor Ōjin]], {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸島比賣命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsu-hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.<ref name="gunshi"/><ref name="rekishiteki-219-232">{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }}</ref>
On [[:en:October 3|October 3]] of [[:en:1872|1872]] ([[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|1=Gō-sha|WD=Q134917316}}{{efn|District Shrines|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gōsha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} under the [[:en:Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines]].<ref name="gunshi"/> It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of [[:en:Nukata District|Nukata District]].<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }}</ref>
A {{ill|Munafuda|ja|棟札|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mune-fuda|qq=}} dated [[:en:August 14|August 14]], 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.<ref name="choushi">額田町史、pp.188-189</ref> This plaque predates others such as the one from [[:en:1122|1122]] ([[:en:Hōan|Hōan era]] 3) at [[:en:Chūson-ji|Chūson-ji]].<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}}</ref> However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity.<ref name="choushi"/> The plaque was exhibited at the [[:en:Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition]] in [[:en:1937|1937]] ([[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] 12).<ref name="choushi"/>
In [[:en:1894|1894]] (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in [[:en:1935|1935]] (Shōwa 10).<ref name="rekishiteki-219-232"/>
A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on [[:en:October 20|October 20]], [[:en:2012|2012]] (Heisei 24).

'''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama|1=Natsuyama-chō, Okazaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11429972}}, [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|1=Natsuyama Fire Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30925230}}, held in [[:en:October|October]].
== Overview == The shrine was established in [[:en:531|531]] (25th year of [[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]]) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アマツヒコネ}}.<ref name="gunshi">愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353</ref>
In [[:en:880|880]] ([[:en:Gangyō|Gangyō]] 4), [[:en:Emperor Ōjin|Emperor Ōjin]], {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸島比賣命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsu-hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.<ref name="gunshi"/><ref name="rekishiteki-219-232">{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }}</ref>
On [[:en:October 3|October 3]] of [[:en:1872|1872]] ([[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|1=Gō-sha|WD=Q134917316}}{{efn|District Shrines|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gōsha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} under the [[:en:Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines]].<ref name="gunshi"/> It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of [[:en:Nukata District|Nukata District]].<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }}</ref>
A {{ill|Munafuda|ja|棟札|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mune-fuda|qq=}} dated [[:en:August 14|August 14]], 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.<ref name="choushi">額田町史、pp.188-189</ref> This plaque predates others such as the one from [[:en:1122|1122]] ([[:en:Hōan|Hōan era]] 3) at [[:en:Chūson-ji|Chūson-ji]].<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}}</ref> However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity.<ref name="choushi"/> The plaque was exhibited at the [[:en:Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition]] in [[:en:1937|1937]] ([[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] 12).<ref name="choushi"/>
In [[:en:1894|1894]] (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in [[:en:1935|1935]] (Shōwa 10).<ref name="rekishiteki-219-232"/>
A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on [[:en:October 20|October 20]], [[:en:2012|2012]] (Heisei 24).

Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|1=Natsuyama Fire Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30925230}} |prefecture = {{ill|Okazaki|WD=Q242783}} |coordinates = {{Coord|34.941694|N|137.311194|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} }}
[[File:Natsuyama-Hachimangu-5.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|1=Natsuyama Fire Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30925230}}]]
'''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama|1=Natsuyama-chō, Okazaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11429972}}, [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|1=Natsuyama Fire Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30925230}}, held in [[:en:October|October]].
== Overview == The shrine was established in [[:en:531|531]] (25th year of [[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]]) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アマツヒコネ}}.<ref name="gunshi">愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353</ref>
In [[:en:880|880]] ([[:en:Gangyō|Gangyō]] 4), [[:en:Emperor Ōjin|Emperor Ōjin]], {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸島比賣命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsu-hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.<ref name="gunshi"/><ref name="rekishiteki-219-232">{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }}</ref>
On [[:en:October 3|October 3]] of [[:en:1872|1872]] ([[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|1=Gō-sha|WD=Q134917316}}{{efn|District Shrines|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gōsha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} under the [[:en:Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines]].<ref name="gunshi"/> It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of [[:en:Nukata District|Nukata District]].<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }}</ref>
A {{ill|Munafuda|ja|棟札|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mune-fuda|qq=}} dated [[:en:August 14|August 14]], 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.<ref name="choushi">額田町史、pp.188-189</ref> This plaque predates others such as the one from [[:en:1122|1122]] ([[:en:Hōan|Hōan era]] 3) at [[:en:Chūson-ji|Chūson-ji]].<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}}</ref> However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity.<ref name="choushi"/> The plaque was exhibited at the [[:en:Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition]] in [[:en:1937|1937]] ([[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] 12).<ref name="choushi"/>
In [[:en:1894|1894]] (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in [[:en:1935|1935]] (Shōwa 10).<ref name="rekishiteki-219-232"/>
A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on [[:en:October 20|October 20]], [[:en:2012|2012]] (Heisei 24).

'''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama|1=Natsuyama-chō, Okazaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11429972}}, [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|1=Natsuyama Fire Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30925230}}, held in [[:en:October|October]].
== Overview == The shrine was established in [[:en:531|531]] (25th year of [[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]]) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アマツヒコネ}}.<ref name="gunshi">愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353</ref>
In [[:en:880|880]] ([[:en:Gangyō|Gangyō]] 4), [[:en:Emperor Ōjin|Emperor Ōjin]], {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸島比賣命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsu-hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.<ref name="gunshi"/><ref name="rekishiteki-219-232">{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }}</ref>
On [[:en:October 3|October 3]] of [[:en:1872|1872]] ([[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|1=Gō-sha|WD=Q134917316}}{{efn|District Shrines|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gōsha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} under the [[:en:Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines]].<ref name="gunshi"/> It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of [[:en:Nukata District|Nukata District]].<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }}</ref>
A {{ill|Munafuda|ja|棟札|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mune-fuda|qq=}} dated [[:en:August 14|August 14]], 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.<ref name="choushi">額田町史、pp.188-189</ref> This plaque predates others such as the one from [[:en:1122|1122]] ([[:en:Hōan|Hōan era]] 3) at [[:en:Chūson-ji|Chūson-ji]].<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}}</ref> However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity.<ref name="choushi"/> The plaque was exhibited at the [[:en:Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition]] in [[:en:1937|1937]] ([[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] 12).<ref name="choushi"/>
In [[:en:1894|1894]] (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in [[:en:1935|1935]] (Shōwa 10).<ref name="rekishiteki-219-232"/>
A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on [[:en:October 20|October 20]], [[:en:2012|2012]] (Heisei 24).

[[File:Natsuyama-Hachimangu-5.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|1=Natsuyama Fire Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30925230}}]]
'''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama|1=Natsuyama-chō, Okazaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11429972}}, [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|1=Natsuyama Fire Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30925230}}, held in [[:en:October|October]].
== Overview == The shrine was established in [[:en:531|531]] (25th year of [[:en:Emperor Keitai|Emperor Keitai]]) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アマツヒコネ}}.<ref name="gunshi">愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353</ref>
In [[:en:880|880]] ([[:en:Gangyō|Gangyō]] 4), [[:en:Emperor Ōjin|Emperor Ōjin]], {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸島比賣命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsu-hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.<ref name="gunshi"/><ref name="rekishiteki-219-232">{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }}</ref>
On [[:en:October 3|October 3]] of [[:en:1872|1872]] ([[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|1=Gō-sha|WD=Q134917316}}{{efn|District Shrines|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gōsha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} under the [[:en:Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines]].<ref name="gunshi"/> It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of [[:en:Nukata District|Nukata District]].<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }}</ref>
A {{ill|Munafuda|ja|棟札|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mune-fuda|qq=}} dated [[:en:August 14|August 14]], 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.<ref name="choushi">額田町史、pp.188-189</ref> This plaque predates others such as the one from [[:en:1122|1122]] ([[:en:Hōan|Hōan era]] 3) at [[:en:Chūson-ji|Chūson-ji]].<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}}</ref> However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity.<ref name="choushi"/> The plaque was exhibited at the [[:en:Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition]] in [[:en:1937|1937]] ([[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] 12).<ref name="choushi"/>
In [[:en:1894|1894]] (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in [[:en:1935|1935]] (Shōwa 10).<ref name="rekishiteki-219-232"/>
A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on [[:en:October 20|October 20]], [[:en:2012|2012]] (Heisei 24).
== Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == {{main|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival}}
== References == {{reflist}}
== Bibliography == * 『額田町史』額田町史編集委員会、[[:en:1986|1986]]11月1日 * 『愛知縣額田郡誌（復刻版）』千秋社、[[:en:2003|2003]] * 『三河國額田郡誌（完）』愛知県額田郡役所、[[:en:1924|1924]]（原本）

'''Natsuyama Hachimangu''' (夏山八幡宮) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|Natsuyama|ja|夏山町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama|1=Natsuyama-chō, Okazaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11429972}}, {{ill|Okazaki, Aichi|en|Okazaki, Aichi|WD=Q242783|lt=Okazaki}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture}}. It is renowned for the {{ill|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|ja|夏山八幡宮火祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival|1=Natsuyama Fire Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30925230}}, held in {{ill|October|en|October|WD=Q124|lt=October}}.
== Overview == The shrine was established in {{ill|531|en|531|WD=Q32871|lt=531}} (25th year of {{ill|Emperor Keitai|en|Emperor Keitai|WD=Q349277|lt=Emperor Keitai}}) to enshrine {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アマツヒコネ}}.<ref name="gunshi">愛知縣額田郡誌、pp.353</ref>
In {{ill|880|en|880|WD=Q23618|lt=880}} ({{ill|Gangyō|en|Gangyō|WD=Q747451|lt=Gangyō}} 4), {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|en|Emperor Ōjin|WD=Q317997|lt=Emperor Ōjin}}, {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸島比賣命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}}, {{ill|Tagitsu-hime|ja|多岐都比賣神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsu-hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 住吉三神}} were enshrined alongside and the shrine was named "Ōmiya Hachimangu." It was later renamed to its current name.<ref name="gunshi"/><ref name="rekishiteki-219-232">{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134_d/fil/10-02-7.pdf |title=第2章07 額田地区の山里のくらしにみる歴史的風致 |format=PDF |website=[https://www.city.okazaki.lg.jp/1550/1567/452000/p020134.html 岡崎市歴史的風致維持向上計画] |publisher=岡崎市 |accessdate=2022-6-3 }}</ref>
On {{ill|October 3|en|October 3|WD=Q2931|lt=October 3}} of {{ill|1872|en|1872|WD=Q7753|lt=1872}} ({{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 5), it was designated as a {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|1=Gō-sha|WD=Q134917316}}{{efn|District Shrines|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gōsha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} under the {{ill|Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|en|Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|WD=Q712534|lt=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines}}.<ref name="gunshi"/> It is regarded as a shrine dedicated to the ancestor deity of {{ill|Nukata District|en|Nukata District|WD=Q787290|lt=Nukata District}}.<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/event/682 | title=夏山八幡宮火まつり |website=岡崎おでかけナビ |publisher=岡崎市観光協会 |date= | accessdate=2022-1-5 }}</ref>
A {{ill|Munafuda|ja|棟札|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mune-fuda|qq=}} dated {{ill|August 14|en|August 14|WD=Q2775|lt=August 14}}, 880 (Gangyō 4) still exists at the shrine, serving as historical evidence of its construction.<ref name="choushi">額田町史、pp.188-189</ref> This plaque predates others such as the one from {{ill|1122|en|1122|WD=Q23417|lt=1122}} ({{ill|Hōan|en|Hōan|WD=Q1194464|lt=Hōan era}} 3) at {{ill|Chūson-ji|en|Chūson-ji|WD=Q2660144|lt=Chūson-ji}}.<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%A3%9F%E6%9C%AD-140683 |title=棟札とは |publisher=コトバンク |accessdate=2013-01-21}}</ref> However, the exact date is debated due to questions about its authenticity.<ref name="choushi"/> The plaque was exhibited at the {{ill|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|en|Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition|WD=Q6958984|lt=Nagoya Pan-Pacific Peace Exposition}} in {{ill|1937|en|1937|WD=Q18647|lt=1937}} ({{ill|Shōwa era|en|Shōwa era|WD=Q327567|lt=Shōwa}} 12).<ref name="choushi"/>
In {{ill|1894|en|1894|WD=Q7843|lt=1894}} (Meiji 27), the current main hall, built in {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|en|Nagare-zukuri|WD=Q210684|lt=Nagare-zukuri}} style, was constructed. The Kaguraden was added in {{ill|1935|en|1935|WD=Q18658|lt=1935}} (Shōwa 10).<ref name="rekishiteki-219-232"/>
A ceremony celebrating the completion of a new worship hall was held on {{ill|October 20|en|October 20|WD=Q2959|lt=October 20}}, {{ill|2012|en|2012|WD=Q1990|lt=2012}} (Heisei 24).
== Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival == {{main|Natsuyama Hachimangu Fire Festival}}
